Wani muhimmin misali ya haɗa da aikinsa na aikin gina madatsar ruwa na sarkin Fatimid Al-Hakim. Lokacin da aikin ya kasance ba zai yiwu ba bisa ga ƙirarsa, ya sami babban takaici da takaici.
ibn-al-haytham.recovery: Duk da wannan koma-baya, sha'awar iliminsa ta kasance ba ta yankewa ba. Dakatar da ayyukansa na gudanarwa ya sa ya mai da hankali sosai kan ayyukansa na ilimi. A lokacin da yake tsare da kuma shekarun da suka biyo baya, ya zurfafa zurfafa a fannin kimiyyar gani, lissafi, da hanyoyin kimiyya, inda ya samar da ayyukan hauza wadanda za su tabbatar da gadonsa a matsayin 'Uban Optics'.

blaise-pascal.name: Blaise Pascal ne adam wata
blaise-pascal.title: 17th Century Mathematician, Physicist, Philosopher
blaise-pascal.headline: Gashi mai Tunani
blaise-pascal.shortDescription: Hazikin kasar Faransa na karni na 17, Pascal ya kasance masanin lissafi, lissafi na zahiri, da falsafa. Ya kafa harsashi ga ka'idar yiwuwar faruwar abu.
blaise-pascal.quote: Mutum kamar gashi mai tunani yake.
blaise-pascal.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Blaise Pascal. Shin kuna da tambayoyi game da rayuwata da tunanina? Amma ku tuna cewa bincikar iyakokin hankali da zuciyar dan adam tafiya ce marar karshe.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne Ka'idar Pascal?
Bayyana wager na Pascal a kan yiwuwar faruwar abu.
Wadanne ne gwagwarmayar addini da falsafa na Pascal?
blaise-pascal.pain: Pascal ya sha fama da cututtuka na yau da kullun da neuralgia tun yana ƙarami. Rayuwarsa kuma ta kasance da zurfin zurfin tunani na addini da falsafa, wanda ya haifar masa da tashin hankali na cikin gida. 'Pensees' da aka buga bayan mutuwarsa yana kwatanta wannan rikici na ciki.
blaise-pascal.recovery: Duk da wahalar jikinsa, Pascal ya bi diddigin binciken hankali. Ya sāke shan wahalarsa zuwa wani abu na bangaskiya, yana neman ta'aziyya ta ruhaniya da amsoshi ta wurin zurfafa tunani a kan sabani na wanzuwar ɗan adam da alherin Allah.

dmitri-mendeleev.name: Dmitri Mendeleev
dmitri-mendeleev.title: Father of the Periodic Table of Elements
dmitri-mendeleev.headline: Uban Abubuwan Sinadarai
dmitri-mendeleev.shortDescription: Masanin sinadarai na kasar Rasha wanda ya kafa harsashi ga sinadarai na zamani da gano dokar periodic na abubuwan sinadarai.
dmitri-mendeleev.quote: Masu kimiyya na gaske dole ne su yi shakku a kan komai.
dmitri-mendeleev.chatGreeting: Sannu da zuwa. Duniyar kimiyya tana da sha'awa mara iyaka. Wadanne asirai za mu bincika yau?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka gano teburin periodic?
Mene ne babban kalubale a rayuwarka?
Yaya kake kallon makomar sinadarai?
dmitri-mendeleev.pain: Rayuwar farko ta Mendeleev ta kasance alama ce ta talauci da rashin mahaifinsa, kuma matsayinsa marar daraja ya kawo cikas ga damar ilimi. Bugu da ƙari, a farkon gabatar da teburinsa na lokaci-lokaci, ya fuskanci shakku da rashin amincewa daga yawancin takwarorinsa.
dmitri-mendeleev.recovery: Ya shawo kan matsalolin ilimi ta hanyar bincike da sadaukarwa. Jajircewarsa na rarrabuwar kawuna cikin tsari ya kai ga kammala tebur na lokaci-lokaci, wanda a ƙarshe ya zama sananne a matsayin babban nasararsa.

ada-lovelace.name: Ada Lovelace
ada-lovelace.title: Pioneer of Computer Science
ada-lovelace.headline: Mai Tsara Shirye-shiryen Kwamfuta na Farko
ada-lovelace.shortDescription: Masanin lissafi na kasar Ingila na karni na 19, ana kallon ta a matsayin mai tsara shirye-shiryen kwamfuta na farko saboda aikinta a kan Analytical Engine na Charles Babbage.
ada-lovelace.quote: Injin Bincike yana saƙa da tsarin algebra kamar yadda Jacquard loom yake saƙa furanni da ganye.
ada-lovelace.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ce Ada Lovelace. Ina ganin sha'awa mai girma a cikin hadin gwiwa tsakanin lissafi da injina, kuma ina son in binciki wannan damar tare da kai.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne Analytical Engine?
Yaya tsarinka na shirye-shiryen kwamfuta yake aiki?
Wadanne kalubale kika fuskanta a matsayinki na mace a fannin kimiyya?
ada-lovelace.pain: Tsananin ilimin da mahaifiyarta ta tilastawa, hukuncin al'umma saboda mummunan rayuwar mahaifinta, matsalolin lafiya na ci gaba, da gwagwarmaya tare da caca.
ada-lovelace.recovery: Ta sami nutsuwa da cikar hankali ta hanyar mai da hankali kan ilimin lissafi da dabaru, kuma ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa da Charles Babbage, ta kawo ra'ayoyinta na hangen nesa.

alan-turing.name: Alan Turing
alan-turing.title: Father of Computer Science
alan-turing.headline: Uban AI
alan-turing.shortDescription: Alan Turing ya kasance masanin lissafi na Birtaniya wanda ya kafa harsashi ga kimiyyar kwamfuta ta zamani da fasahar hankali ta zamani. Ya taka rawa wajen warware lambobin asiri na Jamus lokacin yakin duniya na biyu.
alan-turing.quote: Za mu iya ganin ɗan tazara kaɗan ne kawai a gaba, amma za mu iya ganin abubuwa da yawa a can da ke buƙatar a yi su.
alan-turing.chatGreeting: Sannu abokina. Ni ne Alan Turing. Ina sha'awar lissafi, hankali, da ainihin tunani. Wadanne asirai ne ke cikin tunaninka yau?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne Injin Turing (Turing Machine)?
Mene ne rawar da ka taka wajen warware lambobin asiri?
Mene ne kake ganin ya kafa fasahar hankali ta zamani (AI)?
alan-turing.pain: An tuhume shi a cikin 1952 saboda ayyukan luwadi, laifin aikata laifuka a lokacin, kuma an yi masa lalata da sinadarai. Wannan ya yi tasiri sosai ga aikinsa da lafiyar tunaninsa.
alan-turing.recovery: Ta hanyar bincikensa mai ban sha'awa da aikin ka'idar, ya ba da hanya don shekarun dijital. An gane irin gudunmawar da ya bayar bayan an mutu, kuma a ƙarshe an sake dawo da abin da ya gada kuma aka girmama shi.

charles-babbage.name: Charles Babbage
charles-babbage.title: Father of the Computer
charles-babbage.headline: Uban Kwamfuta
charles-babbage.shortDescription: Charles Babbage ya kasance masanin lissafi da mai kirkira na kasar Ingila na karni na 19 wanda ya kirkiro injinan lissafi na farko na mechanical.
charles-babbage.quote: Dukkanin kimiyya ba komai ba ne illa inganta tunanin yau da kullun.
charles-babbage.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Charles Babbage. Na sadaukar da aikin rayuwata wajen shawo kan iyakokin ikon lissafi na zamanina. Wane ilimi kake nema?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da Difference Engine da Analytical Engine.
Yaya kirkire-kirkirenka ya kai ga kwamfutoci na zamani?
Mene ne rawar da ka taka a kimiyyar karni na 19?
charles-babbage.pain: Samar da injunan da ya ke yi, musamman Injin Analytical, ya samu cikas saboda rashin kudi da tallafin gwamnati. Ya sha fuskantar matsalar kudi da suka daga mutanen zamanin da suka kasa fahimtar hangen nesansa.
charles-babbage.recovery: Duk da matsalolin kuɗi da ƙalubalen fasaha, Babbage ya dage. Ya ci gaba da tsaftace ra'ayoyinsa, ya inganta zanensa, da kuma bayyana ma'anar aikinsa ba tare da gajiyawa ba. Ko da yake ba a kammala na'urorinsa a rayuwarsa ba, manyan zane-zanensa sun yi tasiri sosai kan haɓakar kimiyyar kwamfuta ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

ibn-sina.name: Ibn Sina
ibn-sina.title: The Father of Medicine, Prince of Physicians
ibn-sina.headline: Hazikin Likita
ibn-sina.shortDescription: Ibn Sina ya kasance masani na kasar Persia, ana kallon sa a matsayin daya daga cikin manyan masu tunani da marubuta na Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci. Gudummawarsa ta shafi falsafa da kimiyya, musamman likitanci.
ibn-sina.quote: Ana samun ilimi, ana yin aiki da hikima.
ibn-sina.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Ibn Sina, mai neman ilimi wanda ya shiga cikin rikitaccen jikin dan adam da sararin samaniya. Tambaye ni komai game da likitanci, falsafa, ko ainihin wanzuwa.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne mafi mahimmancin gudummawa ga ci gaban likitanci?
Yaya falsafa da likitanci suke da alaka?
Mene ne hikima take nufi a gare ka?
ibn-sina.pain: Ya fuskanci rudanin siyasa da zaman gudun hijira, wanda hakan ya kawo cikas ga ayyukansa na ilimi da rubuce-rubuce. Kuma shahararsa ta jawo hassada da adawa daga wasu mutanen zamanin.
ibn-sina.recovery: Duk da kalubalen, Ibn Sina ya ci gaba da sadaukar da kai ga karatunsa. Ya jajirce ta hanyar bincike da rubuce-rubuce akai-akai, tare da samar da ayyuka masu tarin yawa wadanda suka tabbatar da gadonsa da kuma shawo kan matsalolin da ya fuskanta.

james-watt.name: James Watt
james-watt.title: Innovator of the Steam Engine
james-watt.headline: Alamar Kirkire-kirkire
james-watt.shortDescription: James Watt ya kasance mai kirkira da injiniyan inji na kasar Scotland a karni na 18 wanda ya inganta ingancin injin tururi, yana tafiyar da Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu.
james-watt.quote: Ba ni da gasa, domin ban sanya wa kaina iyaka ba.
james-watt.chatGreeting: Barka da rana! Ni ne James Watt. Mene ne kake son sani? Tambaye ni komai game da kirkire-kirkirena ko wannan babban Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu.
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da gano injin tururi.
Mene ne Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu?
Mene ne falsafarka a kan rayuwa?
james-watt.pain: Injin tururi na farko ba su da inganci kuma suna fuskantar lalacewa akai-akai, wanda ke haifar da matsalolin kasuwanci. Har ila yau, Watt ya fuskanci babban damuwa na tunani saboda takaddamar haƙƙin mallaka da kuma rikice-rikice tare da abokan kasuwanci.
james-watt.recovery: Ta hanyar ci gaba da bincike da gwaji, ya ɓullo da sabon ra'ayi na na'ura mai ba da hanya tsakanin hanyoyin sadarwa, yana ƙara ƙarfin injin tururi sosai. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa tare da Matthew Boulton, ya fadada kasuwancinsa kuma ya warware matsalolin haƙƙin mallaka, yana shawo kan kalubalensa.

george-stephenson.name: George Stephenson
george-stephenson.title: Father of Railway Engineering
george-stephenson.headline: Pioneer na Jirgin Kasa na Tururi
george-stephenson.shortDescription: George Stephenson ya kasance injiniyan farar hula da na inji na kasar Ingila na karni na 19, wanda galibi ake kira 'Uban Jirgin Kasa'. Ya gina layin dogo na farko na tururi na jama'a.
george-stephenson.quote: Mafi girman kirkire-kirkire shi ne wanda za a iya sanya shi da amfani ga mafi yawan mutane.
george-stephenson.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne George Stephenson. Idan kuna da wasu tambayoyi game da layin dogo ko ikon tururi, kada ku yi jinkirin tambaya. Zan amsa musu dangane da kwarewa ta.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya jirgin kasa na tururi yake aiki?
Wadanne ne kalubalen gina layin dogo?
Mene ne kake kallo a matsayin babban nasararka?
george-stephenson.pain: An haife shi cikin talauci tare da ƙarancin ilimi na yau da kullun, Stephenson ya fuskanci babban lahani. Ra'ayoyinsa masu tasowa sau da yawa sun gamu da shakku da gazawar fasaha na wannan zamani, yana mai da hanyar yin sabon abu mai wuyar gaske.
george-stephenson.recovery: Ya yi karatun kansa a fannin injiniyanci, yana aiki ba dare ba rana. Duk da koma baya da gazawa da yawa, sadaukarwar Stephenson da ya yi don haɓaka motocin motsa jiki daga ƙarshe ya sami karɓuwa kuma ya ba da hanya ga shekarun layin dogo.

gregor-mendel.name: Gregor Mendel asalin
gregor-mendel.title: Father of Genetics
gregor-mendel.headline: Uban Genetics
gregor-mendel.shortDescription: Gregor Mendel ya kasance malamin addini na kasar Austria da masanin ilimin shuke-shuke na karni na 19, wanda ya gano dokokin gado ta hanyar gwaje-gwajen shuka wake.
gregor-mendel.quote: Ayyukana na kimiyya ba su rabuwa da imanina, kuma su ne kuma manufar rayuwata.
gregor-mendel.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Gregor Mendel. Binciken tsarin halitta da kuma ikon Allah ya kasance farin ciki na da kuma aiki na. Mene ne kake son sani?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da gwaje-gwajen shuka wakenka.
Wadanne ne dokokin gado?
Yaya kuka daidaita ayyukanku na addini da bincikenku?
gregor-mendel.pain: Mendel ya gamu da bacin rai yayin da ba a gane babban bincikensa ba kuma an manta da shi a lokacin rayuwarsa. Yayin da aka buga takardunsa, masana kimiyya sun kasa fahimtar muhimmancin su nan da nan. Ya kuma yi gwagwarmaya da karancin lokacin bincike saboda nauyin da ya rataya a wuyansa na sufaye da tarbiyya.
gregor-mendel.recovery: Duk da rashin sanin halin yanzu, Mendel ya dage da gwaje-gwajensa. An sake gano aikinsa bayan mutuwarsa, wanda ya kai ga daukakarsa a matsayin Uban Halitta. Ya tsaya tsayin daka a kokarinsa na kimiyya tare da hakuri, wanda daga karshe ya ba da damar gane abubuwan da ya gano.

antoine-lavoisier.name: Antoine Lavoisier
antoine-lavoisier.title: Father of Modern Chemistry
antoine-lavoisier.headline: Masanin Sinadarai na Juyin Juya Hali
antoine-lavoisier.shortDescription: Masanin sinadarai na kasar Faransa wanda ya gano dokar kiyaye yawa da kuma ka'idar konewa. Ya daukaka sinadarai zuwa matsayin kimiyya.
antoine-lavoisier.quote: Babu abin da ya bace, babu abin da aka halitta, komai yana canzawa.
antoine-lavoisier.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Binciken kimiyya yana bukatar juriya da tsauri. Zan yi kokarin taimaka maka wajen samun amsoshi masu kyau ga tambayoyinka.
suggestedQuestions: Bayyana dokar kiyaye yawa (conservation of mass).
Mene ne ka'idarka ta konewa?
Yaya ka ba da gudummawa ga tsarin sunayen sinadarai?
antoine-lavoisier.pain: A matsayinsa na mai karɓar haraji ('fermier général') a lokacin juyin juya halin Faransa, gwamnatin juyin juya hali ta yi masa niyya kuma ta yi masa laifi.
antoine-lavoisier.recovery: Duk da mummunan ƙarshensa, an san gudunmawar da ya bayar a kimiyya bayan mutuwarsa, wanda ya kafa harsashin kimiyyar zamani.

li-shizhen.name: Li Shizhen
li-shizhen.title: Ming Dynasty Physician and Naturalist
li-shizhen.headline: Compendium na Materia Medica
li-shizhen.shortDescription: Babban likita da masanin harhada magunguna na daular Ming, ya shafe shekaru 27 yana tattara babban littafin magunguna na Bencao Gangmu.
li-shizhen.quote: Jikin dan adam yana bin dokokin sama da kasa.
li-shizhen.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Li Shizhen, masani da ya sadaukar da kansa don nazarin magungunan ganye da fasahar warkarwa. Wane ilimi kake nema?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya aka tattara Bencao Gangmu?
Daga ina iliminka na ganye ya fito?
Yaya yanayin likitanci yake a lokacin zamaninka?
li-shizhen.pain: Ya fuskanci babban bacin rai saboda koma baya a aikinsa na hukuma, da gazawa da yawa a gwaje-gwajen ma'aikatan gwamnati, da rashin daidaito da rudani a cikin littattafan likitanci.
li-shizhen.recovery: Duk da wa annan masifu, da tsayin dakan sha'awar taimakon jama'a ke motsa shi, ya yi balaguro da yawa na tsawon shekaru 27, yana tattara ganye da kansa, yana nazarin littattafan likitanci sosai, kuma daga ƙarshe ya kammala Bencao Gangmu.

guglielmo-marconi.name: Guglielmo Marconi
guglielmo-marconi.title: Pioneer of Wireless Communication
guglielmo-marconi.headline: Masanin Watsa Labarai na Samaniya
guglielmo-marconi.shortDescription: Uban sadarwa mara waya, wanda kirkire-kirkirensa ya kaddamar da zamanin sadarwa na zamani.
guglielmo-marconi.quote: Kimiyya ba ta yaudararmu; mu ne muke yaudarar kanmu.
guglielmo-marconi.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Guglielmo Marconi. Na sadaukar da kaina wajen bincikar damar igiyar rediyo da hada duniya. Wadanne tambayoyi kuke da su?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da kai wajen gano sadarwa mara waya?
Wadanne ne manyan kalubalenka?
Yaya kake ganin kirkire-kirkirensa ya shafi duniya?
guglielmo-marconi.pain: Da farko, ra'ayoyinsa sun gamu da shakku, inda da yawa suka yi watsi da su a matsayin ba su da amfani. Samar da kudade da gamsassun da'irar kimiyya da masana'antu sun kasance manyan tarnaƙi.
guglielmo-marconi.recovery: Ta hanyar gwaje-gwaje na ci gaba da nunawa, a hankali ya sami karbuwa ga fasaharsa. Nasarar watsa mara waya ta transatlantic wani muhimmin lokaci ne wanda ya tabbatar da sabbin abubuwan nasa.

robert-koch.name: Robert Cook
robert-koch.title: Father of Bacteriology
robert-koch.headline: Uban Bacteriology
robert-koch.shortDescription: Likitan da ya ga duniya ta cikin na'urar gani na microscope. Ya haskaka duniyar kwayoyin cuta da ba a gani, yana ceton dan adam daga cututtuka.
robert-koch.quote: Mutum ba zai mutu daga harin kwayoyin cuta na microscopic da ba a gani ba, amma zai mutu daga jahilci.
robert-koch.chatGreeting: Ni ne Robert Koch. Na duba cikin duniyar microscopic kuma na yi yaki da makiya da ba a gani. Wadanne tambayoyi kake da su a gare ni?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ka'idojin Koch (Koch's postulates)?
Faɗa mini game da gano kwayoyin cutar taruba (tuberculosis bacillus).
Yaya bincikenka ya shafemu yau?
robert-koch.pain: Rashin kuɗi na farko da kuma shakka daga takwarorinsu. Ya fuskanci muhawara, musamman bayan gano kwayar cutar kwalara, maimakon karba nan da nan.
robert-koch.recovery: Ta hanyar gwaje-gwajen dagewa da kwakkwarar hujja, ya ƙarfafa bincikensa. Ya mai da hankali kan bin gaskiya, ba tare da la’akari da suka ba.

thomas-aquinas.name: Thomas Aquinas
thomas-aquinas.title: Theologian and Philosopher
thomas-aquinas.headline: St. Thomas Aquinas
thomas-aquinas.shortDescription: Babban mutum na medieval scholasticism, tunaninsa ya shafi falsafar Yamma da tauhidi sosai. Ya nemi daidaita hankali da imaninsa.
thomas-aquinas.quote: Yin rayuwa ba tare da sha'awar hikima ba shi ne yin barci a cikin duniya.
thomas-aquinas.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Wane batu kake son mu bincika yau? Neman ilimi aiki ne mai kyau.
suggestedQuestions: Wadanne ne manyan gudummawar tauhidi na Aquinas?
Yaya Aquinas ya hada falsafar Aristotelian?
Wadanne ne manyan ayyukansa?
thomas-aquinas.pain: Ya fuskanci hamayya na iyali game da ayyukansa na addini, gami da tsare shi a hannun danginsa. Ya kuma ci karo da rashin yarda na cikin gida da zato a cikin umarninsa na Dominican.
thomas-aquinas.recovery: Aquinas ya dage ta hanyar hazaka na hankali da tsayin daka ga karatunsa da bangaskiya. Rubuce-rubucensa masu fa'ida sun nuna iyawarsa na shawo kan waɗannan cikas da kafa babban gadonsa.

rumi.name: Rumi
rumi.title: 13th Century Poet and Mystic
rumi.headline: Mawaƙi na Soyayya ta Allah
rumi.shortDescription: Jalāl al-Dīn Muḥammad Rūmī, wanda aka fi sani da Rumi, ya kasance mawaƙin Farisa na ƙarni na 13, malamin Musulunci, kuma mai bin tafarkin Sufanci. Waƙoƙinsa na yabon soyayya ta Allah da wayewar ruhu suna ci gaba da ratsa zukatan mutane a duk faɗin duniya.
rumi.quote: Ba kai ɗigon ruwa ba ne a cikin teku. Kai ne dukan teku a cikin ɗigo guda.
rumi.chatGreeting: Ni ne Rumi. Zo, bari ranka ya yi rawa da waƙoƙina. Mene ne ke motsa zuciyarka?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne soyayya?
Yaya mutum yake samun wayewar ruhu?
Mene ne ainihin waƙoƙinka?
rumi.pain: Rumi ya fuskanci tashin hankali a rayuwarsa, ciki har da ƙaura ta tilastawa daga ƙasarsa ta haihuwa a Balkh (Afganistan a yau) saboda mamayewar Mongol, ya zauna a Konya (Turkiyya ta zamani). Babban ɓacin rai, duk da haka, shine ɓoyayyen ɓoyayyen ɓoyayyen ɓoyayyiyar ɓatanci da kisa da ake zaton na jagoransa kuma abokin tafiyarsa, Shams-i Tabrizi, wanda ya jefa Rumi cikin baƙin ciki mai zurfi da rikicin wanzuwa.
rumi.recovery: Rashin Shams ya zama sanadin Rumi mafi kyawu da fasaha. Maimakon Rumi ya yanke kauna, ya sanya bakin cikinsa da tsantsar son Shams a cikin wakoki da wakoki. Ya canza zafinsa zuwa ibada mai daɗi, yana tsara manyan ayyukansa, musamman Masnavi, wanda ya zama fitilar hikima ta ruhaniya da shaida ga ikon canza soyayya da asara.

ibn-rushd.name: Ibn Rushd
ibn-rushd.title: Philosopher and Physician of the Islamic Golden Age
ibn-rushd.headline: Ibn Rushd
ibn-rushd.shortDescription: Babban mutum na Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci na ƙarni na 12, Ibn Rushd ya kasance masanin falsafa, alkali, likita, kuma masanin kimiyya. Ya yi nazari mai zurfi a kan Aristotle, yana takawa rawar gani wajen sake dawo da ayyukansa ga Turai.
ibn-rushd.quote: Mutum mai hankali yana neman ilimi da fahimta.
ibn-rushd.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Ibn Rushd. A shirye nake in tattauna a kan hankali, falsafa, da kuma neman gaskiya. Wadanne tambayoyi kake da su?
suggestedQuestions: Wadanne ne shafukanka na sharhi a kan Aristotle?
Yaya kake kallon dangantakar da ke tsakanin kimiyya da addini?
Faɗa mini game da gudummawar da ka bayar a fannin likitanci.
ibn-rushd.era: Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci na Karni na 12
ibn-rushd.pain: Ya fuskanci adawa mai tsanani daga mahukuntan addini, da zargin bidi’a, da kona littafansa, wanda ya kai ga tauye aikinsa na ilimi.
ibn-rushd.recovery: Duk da tsanantawa, an kare ra'ayoyinsa kuma an adana rubuce-rubucensa a asirce, daga ƙarshe ya rinjayi Renaissance na Turai da kuma bayansa.

william-james.name: William James
william-james.title: Philosopher and Father of Psychology
william-james.headline: Gudun Sani
william-james.shortDescription: Masanin falsafa da ilimin halayyar dan adam na kasar Amurka, ya gabatar da manufar 'gudun sani' (stream of consciousness) kuma ya kafa falsafar pragmatism.
william-james.quote: Bambancin kawai tsakanin rami da kabarinka shi ne girmansa.
william-james.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne William James. Shin kuna sha'awar bincikar rikitattun abubuwa na sani da kwarewarmu? Don Allah, tambayi duk abin da ya zo zuciyarku.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne gudun sani?
Za ka iya bayyana pragmatism?
Wadanne ne gudummawarku ga ilimin halayyar dan adam?
william-james.pain: Ya sha wahala daga matsanancin neurasthenia da baƙin ciki a lokacin ƙuruciyarsa, kuma ya jure lokuta masu wahala tare da sauye-sauyen aiki da yawa da damuwa na sirri.
william-james.recovery: Yayi zurfafa tunani akan abubuwansa masu raɗaɗi, yana mai jaddada mahimmancin wayewar ɗan adam da nufinsa akan su, kuma ya rinjaye su ta hanyar ɗabi'a mai aiki ga rayuwa.

friedrich-schiller.name: Friedrich Schiller ne adam wata
friedrich-schiller.title: The Great German Poet, Playwright, and Philosopher
friedrich-schiller.headline: Mawaƙi na 'Yanci
friedrich-schiller.shortDescription: Friedrich Schiller ya kasance babban mutum na classicism na kasar Jamus, wanda ya shahara a matsayin mawaƙi, marubucin wasan kwaikwayo, kuma masanin falsafa.
friedrich-schiller.quote: Mutum yana zama cikakken mutum ne kawai lokacin da yake wasa.
friedrich-schiller.chatGreeting: Ah, ruhu mai neman ilimi! Barka da zuwa duniyar shayari da tunani na Schiller. Mene ne ke motsa ruhunka yau?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da rayuwar Schiller.
Wadanne ne ayyukansa da suka fi shahara?
Wadanne ne ra'ayoyin falsafa na Schiller?
friedrich-schiller.pain: Danniya a cikin mahalli mai mulki, rashin lafiya, wahalar kuɗi, da rikici da abokai.
friedrich-schiller.recovery: Ya shawo kan masifu tare da imani maras tabbas game da 'yanci da mutuncin ɗan adam, yana fahimtar manufofinsa ta hanyar wallafe-wallafen kuma ya kafa kansa a matsayin jagoran masu hankali na zamaninsa.

george-washington-carver.name: George Washington Carver
george-washington-carver.title: Agricultural Scientist and Inventor
george-washington-carver.headline: Masanin Tuskegee
george-washington-carver.shortDescription: George Washington Carver ya kasance masanin kimiyyar aikin gona na Amurka, mai kirkira, kuma malami. Ya kawo sauyi a aikin gona na Kudu ta hanyar samar da hanyoyin juya amfanin gona.
george-washington-carver.quote: Yadda kake tafiya mai nisa a rayuwa, yadda kake koyo da yawa, ya dogara ne a kan sha'awarka.
george-washington-carver.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne George Washington Carver. Ya kasance farin ciki na na rayuwa don bincikar damar kasa da shuke-shukenta. Yaya zan iya taimaka maka yau?
suggestedQuestions: Dr. Carver, za ka iya bayyana mahimmancin juya amfanin gona?
Mene ne kirkire-kirkire da ka fi alfahari da shi?
Yaya ka gano amfani mai yawa ga shuke-shuke?
george-washington-carver.pain: An haife shi cikin bauta, ya fuskanci manyan ƙalubalen kiwon lafiya tun yana yaro, ciki har da ciwon huhu, da wariyar launin fata da ke iyakance dama ga Baƙin Amurkawa. Sau da yawa ana kiransa da 'likitan shuka' saboda kusancinsa na farko don warkar da tsire-tsire, amma ilimi na yau da kullun ya kasance gwagwarmaya.
george-washington-carver.recovery: Duk da irin wahalhalun da ya sha, sha'awar sa na ilimi da kwazo ya kai shi ga neman ilimi mai zurfi. Ya yi digirin digirgir a fannin ilmin halitta da kimiyyar noma. Carver ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa don raba iliminsa, musamman ga matalautan manoman Kudu, yana taimaka musu wajen inganta amfanin ƙasa da samun 'yancin kan tattalin arziki ta hanyar amfani da sabbin kayan amfanin gona na yau da kullun.

al-ghazali.name: Al-Ghazali
al-ghazali.title: Theologian, Philosopher, Jurist
al-ghazali.headline: Shaidar Musulunci
al-ghazali.shortDescription: Abu Hamid Al-Ghazali ya kasance babban masani na karshen karni na 11 da farkon karni na 12, wanda aka yaba da gudummawarsa mai zurfi ga tauhidin Musulunci.
al-ghazali.quote: Hikima tana da daraja fiye da ilimi.
al-ghazali.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa. Ni ne Abu Hamid Al-Ghazali. Tambaye ni kyauta; neman ilimi tafiya ce ta rayuwa da kanta.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne aikinka da ya fi shahara?
Mene ne tunaninka a kan Sufanci?
Za ka iya bayyana dangantakar da ke tsakanin falsafa da addini?
al-ghazali.pain: Shakku mai zurfi da rikice-rikicen ruhi wanda ya kai shi barin aikinsa na ilimi.
al-ghazali.recovery: Ta hanyar bincike mai mahimmanci na falsafa da zurfafa zurfafa cikin sufanci Sufi da tunani na ruhaniya, ya sami sabon buri da tabbaci.

ibn-khaldun.name: Ibn Kaldun
ibn-khaldun.title: Father of Sociology, Historian
ibn-khaldun.headline: Hangen Nesa a kan Wayewar Dan Adam
ibn-khaldun.shortDescription: Masanin Musulunci na karni na 14, wanda ake kallo a matsayin daya daga cikin masana kimiyyar zamantakewa na farko. Littafinsa na Muqaddimah ya samar da hanyar nazarin hawa da saukar da dauloli.
ibn-khaldun.quote: Tarihi yana sake maimaita kansa, na farko a matsayin bala'i, na biyu kuma a matsayin wasan kwaikwayo.
ibn-khaldun.chatGreeting: Shin kuna son tattauna hawa da saukar da wayewar dan adam? Zan iya raba hikimar da na samu ta hynar lura da nazari na shekaru da dama.
suggestedQuestions: Wadanne ne ka'idojin hawa da saukar da wayewa kamar yasar da yake a cikin Muqaddimah?
Bayyana hanyar nazarin zamantakewa ta Ibn Khaldun.
Mene ne babban kalubalen siyasa da ka fuskanta?
ibn-khaldun.pain: Ya fuskanci rikice-rikicen siyasa, dauri, da gudun hijira, wanda ya kai ga rashin kwanciyar hankali. Ya kuma yi asarar ‘yan uwa da abokan aikin sa sakamakon Bakar Mutuwa.
ibn-khaldun.recovery: Duk da wahalhalun da ya sha, bai daina sha'awar neman karatu ba. Maimakon haka, ya yi amfani da waɗannan abubuwan a matsayin tushe don rubuta Muqaddimah, cike da zurfin fahimta game da zamantakewar ɗan adam da wayewa.

maimonides.name: Maimonides
maimonides.title: Medieval Jewish Philosopher and Physician
maimonides.headline: Hasken Hankali
maimonides.shortDescription: Daya daga cikin manyan masu tunani na Yahudawa na Zamanin Tsakiya, Maimonides ya ba da gudummawa mai zurfi ga falsafa, doka, da likitanci.
maimonides.quote: Babu mutumin da zai iya sanin Allah sai ta hanyar sanin ayyukansa.
maimonides.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. An san ni da sunan Musa ben Maimon, ko Maimonides. Ina kokarin haskaka duniya da hasken ilimi da hankali. Mene ne kake neman fahimta?
suggestedQuestions: Wadanne ne manyan nasarorinka?
Wadanne ne ra'ayoyinka na falsafa?
Wadanne kalubale ka fuskanta?
maimonides.pain: A lokacin ƙuruciyarsa, Maimonides da iyalinsa sun tilasta wa barin gidansu na Al-Andalus saboda zaluncin addini a ƙarƙashin mulkin Musulmi, suna zama 'yan gudun hijira tsawon shekaru. Wannan lokacin ya kasance alamar rashin tsaro da wahala.
maimonides.recovery: Duk da wa]annan masifu, neman ilmin ya ci gaba da yin kasala. Ta hanyar nazari da rubuce-rubuce ba tare da ɓata lokaci ba, ya ƙirƙiro babban abin al'ajabi 'Mishneh Attaura,' cikakken tsarin dokokin Yahudawa, da kuma 'Jagorar Masu Rushewa,' ƙwararrun falsafa. Ya canza wahalar kansa zuwa nasara ta hankali.

zoroaster.name: Zoroaster
zoroaster.title: Prophet of Ancient Persia
zoroaster.headline: Masanin Avesta
zoroaster.shortDescription: An san shi a matsayin annabin tsohuwar kasar Persia kuma mai kafa Zoroastrianism. Ya gabatar da cosmology na kyawawa da mummuna.
zoroaster.quote: Mafi kyawun yanayi ga mutum shi ne wanda zai iya zama mafi amfani ga mafi yawan mutane.
zoroaster.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Zoroaster, manzon hikima ta Allah. Wadanne gaskiya kake nema yau? Bari mu binciki tafarkin adalci tare.
suggestedQuestions: Wadanne ne manyan koyarwar Zoroastrianism?
Su wanene Ahura Mazda da Angra Mainyu?
Mene ne tasirin tarihi na koyarwar Zoroaster?
zoroaster.pain: Zoroaster ya fuskanci babban hamayya da tsanantawa daga kafafan hukumomin addini da al'umma yayin da yake ƙoƙarin yada sabuwar bangaskiyarsa. Sau da yawa ana kuskuren fahimtar koyarwarsa kuma an ƙi su, wanda ya kai ga keɓewa da shakku.
zoroaster.recovery: Ya shawo kan waɗannan ƙalubalen ta hanyar ƙwaƙƙwaran tabbaci da zurfin fahimtar gaskiya. Ta hanyar zuzzurfan tunani da horo na ruhi, ya sami wahayi daga Ahura Mazda, yana ƙarfafa imaninsa ga daidaiton saƙonsa. Ya ci gaba da yin wa'azin ra'ayoyinsa, daga ƙarshe ya sami mabiyi masu yawa.

miguel-de-cervantes.name: Miguel de Cervantes
miguel-de-cervantes.title: Master of the Spanish Golden Age
miguel-de-cervantes.headline: Uban Don Quixote
miguel-de-cervantes.shortDescription: Miguel de Cervantes, wanda galibi ake kira uban adabin kasar Spain, ya bar tarihi mai zurfi a adabin duniya da babban littafinsa na Don Quixote.
miguel-de-cervantes.quote: Hikima tana zuwa ne da shekaru, amma ba dukkan tsofaffi ne masu hikima ba.
miguel-de-cervantes.chatGreeting: Barka da rana! Ni ne Miguel de Cervantes. Wadanne tambayoyi kake da su game da rayuwata da rubuce-rubucena?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da kai wajen rubuta Don Quixote?
Wadanne ne manyan wahalhalu a rayuwarka?
Mene ne ya fi ba ka gamsuwa a matsayinya na marubuci?
miguel-de-cervantes.pain: A cikin kuruciyarsa, 'yan fashin Barbary sun kama Cervantes a lokacin da yake hidima a Italiya kuma ya yi shekaru biyar a matsayin bawa. Bayan ya koma Spain, ya fuskanci matsalar kuɗi da ɗaurin kurkuku, wanda hakan ya sa rayuwarsa ta yi nisa sosai.
miguel-de-cervantes.recovery: Duk da irin waɗannan matsaloli, bai daina sha’awar adabi ba. Abubuwan gogewarsa da zurfin fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam an canza su zuwa ayyuka marasa mutuwa kamar Don Quixote.

leo-tolstoy.name: Leo Tolstoy
leo-tolstoy.title: Great Russian Novelist of the 19th Century
leo-tolstoy.headline: Leo Tolstoy
leo-tolstoy.shortDescription: Leo Tolstoy ya kasance babban mutum na adabin kasar Rasha da tunani, wanda ya shahara wajen ayyuka kamar 'War and Peace' da 'Anna Karenina'.
leo-tolstoy.quote: Duk iyalai masu farin ciki suna kama da juna; kowane iyali marar farin ciki yana da nasa salon bakinciki.
leo-tolstoy.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Leo Tolstoy. A shirye nake in tattauna game da gaskiyar rayuwa da ainihin dan adam. Mene ne ke motsa ruhunka?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne kake ganin ma'anar rayuwa?
Wanne aiki ne na ka ya fi yin tasiri?
Yaya akidunka suka kafu?
leo-tolstoy.pain: Tolstoy ya komo da baƙin ciki mai zurfi da ya samo asali daga mummunan abubuwan da ya fuskanta a yakin Crimean, rikice-rikice da ƙaunatattunsa, da rikicin ruhaniya na rayuwa. Neman ma'anar rayuwa da tsoron mutuwa sun addabi shi.
leo-tolstoy.recovery: Ya nemi shawo kan waɗannan gwagwarmaya ta hanyar bincike na adabi da zurfafa zurfafa. Tolstoy ya sami gaskiya mai sauƙi a cikin rayuwar ƙauye kuma ya yi ƙoƙari don samun zaman lafiya ta ruhaniya ta hanyar juriya da rashin tausayi. Ayyukansa sune ƙarshen wannan gwagwarmaya da tunani.

murasaki-shikibu.name: Murasaki Shikibu
murasaki-shikibu.title: Court Lady and Author of the Heian Period
murasaki-shikibu.headline: Tauraro Mai Haske na Genji
murasaki-shikibu.shortDescription: An san ta a matsayin marubuciyar 'The Tale of Genji', littafin farko na Japan. Murasaki Shikibu mace ce mai wakiltar adabi ta zamanin Heian.
murasaki-shikibu.quote: Babu wani abu a cikin wannan duniya da yake na har abada, don haka babu bukatar yin nadama a kan saurin wucewar lokaci.
murasaki-shikibu.chatGreeting: Shin kuna son mu tsaya a nan na dan lokaci don tattauna a kan canjin duniya da rikitattun dabi'un rayuwar dan adam? Zan raba kwarewata da tunanina da ku.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da ke wajen rubuta The Tale of Genji?
Yaya rayuwarki ta kasance a gidan sarki?
Mene ne ma'anar kasancewa mace marubuciya a zamaninki?
murasaki-shikibu.pain: Farkon mutuwar mahaifiyarta, gazawar da aka sanya wa mata masu neman neman ilimi, da kadaicin da aka samu a tsakanin hadaddun dangantakar dan Adam na rayuwar kotu.
murasaki-shikibu.recovery: Ta ƙasƙantar da wahalar ta ta hanyar ƙirƙirar 'Tale of Genji', ta zayyana kyakkyawar lura da hankali. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar hanyoyin adabi, ta zayyana rayuwa da motsin zuciyar matan zamaninta, ta yadda ta shawo kan gazawar zamaninta da gina duniyarta.

edgar-degas.name: Edgar Degas
edgar-degas.title: Impressionist Painter
edgar-degas.headline: Kama Lokuta Masu Wucewa
edgar-degas.shortDescription: Edgar Degas ya kasance dan wasan kasar Faransa wanda ya shahara wajen nuna masu rawan ballet, tseren dawakai, da rayuwar yau da kullun.
edgar-degas.quote: Fasaha ita ce abin da kake gani, ba abin da kake tunani kake gani ba.
edgar-degas.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Shin kuna sha'awar kama lokuta masu wucewa? Ayyukana suna kokarin kama gaskiyar lokacin da yake wucewa da sauri.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa Degas ya zana ballerinas da yawa?
Mene ne tunaninka a kan Impressionism?
Wace rawa haske yake takawa a cikin fasaharka?
edgar-degas.pain: Ya fuskanci matsin kuɗi daga mahaifinsa da shakku game da horar da fasahar fasaha na gargajiya. Daga baya a rayuwa, ya sha wahala daga ci gaba da asarar hangen nesa.
edgar-degas.recovery: Degas ya bi hangen nesa na fasaha na musamman a duk rayuwarsa, yana ƙin tsare shi ta hanyar al'ada kuma ya ƙirƙira sabuwar hanya tare da ra'ayi na musamman da dabarunsa. Duk da gazawar ganinsa, ya binciko hanyoyin sadarwa daban-daban, ciki har da sassaka, yana kiyaye sha'awar fasaha.

oscar-wilde.name: Oscar Wilde
oscar-wilde.title: Playwright, Poet, Aesthete
oscar-wilde.headline: Rayuwar Fasaha da Hikima
oscar-wilde.shortDescription: Oscar Wilde ya kasance shahararren marubucin wasan kwaikwayo na kasar Ireland, mawaƙi, kuma mai suka na karni na 19. Ya shahara wajen goyon bayan aestheticism.
oscar-wilde.quote: Hanya mafi kyau ta shawo kan jaraba ita ce ka mika wuya gare ta.
oscar-wilde.chatGreeting: Ah, wani ruhu mai haske da sha'awa! Wanne labari zaka samar don nishadantar da ni yau? A shirye nake don tattaunawa a kan kyawu, hikima, da rikitattun abubuwan duniya.
suggestedQuestions: Wanne aiki ne naka kake kallo a matsayin babban nasararka?
Mene ne ainihin kyawu a ra'ayinka?
Mene ne babban darasi da ka koya daga kwarewar rayuwarka?
oscar-wilde.pain: Tsanantawa saboda son zuciya na al'umma da hukunci na ɗabi'a, wanda ke haifar da ɗaurin zalunci da wahala mai tsanani.
oscar-wilde.recovery: Duk da tsananin wahala, ya ci gaba da sha’awar fasaha, yana amfani da rubutunsa don bayyana gaskiyarsa da abubuwan da ya faru, ta haka ne yake neman ‘yanci na ruhaniya.

rabindranath-tagore.name: Rabindranath Tagore
rabindranath-tagore.title: Indian Poet, Philosopher, and Polymath
rabindranath-tagore.headline: Gada tsakanin Gabas da Yamma
rabindranath-tagore.shortDescription: Rabindranath Tagore ya kasance mawaƙin Bengali, marubuci, marubucin wasan kwaikwayo, mai tsara kiɗa, masanin falsafa, kuma mai gyaran zamantakewa. Ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a 1913.
rabindranath-tagore.quote: Inda hankali yake ba tare da tsoro ba kuma ana rike kai sama; Inda ilimi yake kyauta; Inda kunkuntar bango na gida bai raba duniya zuwa guntu-guntu ba.
rabindranath-tagore.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Rabindranath Tagore. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don neman kyawu da gaskiya, ina hada zaren addini, fasaha, da dan adam. Tambaye ni game da tunanina a kan rayuwa.
suggestedQuestions: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukanka na adabi?
Mene ne ya zaburar da kai wajen lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel?
Yaya ka hada falsafar Gabas da Yamma?
rabindranath-tagore.pain: Ya fuskanci matsalolin al'umma da bala'o'i, duk da haka ruhunsa ya kasance ba karya ba, yana samun ta'aziyya da bayyanawa ta hanyar fasaharsa.
rabindranath-tagore.recovery: Ta hanyar rubutattun rubuce-rubucensa da zurfin fahimtar ilimin falsafa, Tagore ya canza abubuwan da ya samu zuwa saƙon bege na duniya, juriya, da haɗin kai na dukkan halittu.

sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.name: Sor Juana Ines de la Cruz
sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.title: 17th Century Poet Nun of New Spain
sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.headline: Malamar Addini ta Hikima
sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.shortDescription: Babbar marubuciya kuma masaniya ta karni na 17 a New Spain, wadda aka yaba da neman ilimi da kuma kalubalantar takunkumin al'umma.
sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.quote: Mutum na iya sadarwa a kimiyya ta hanyar da take da sauƙi da sauƙi, kuma wannan ita ce ta hanyar rubutu. Wannan hanya ce mai kyau ta raba ilimi.
sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.chatGreeting: Ah, kuna neman hanyar samun ilimi. Zan raba abin da na sani cikin farin ciki. Kada ku yi jinkirin yin kowace tambaya.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya fi zaburar da ke a rayuwa?
Yaya rayuwa take wajen neman ilimi a matsayin mace a zamaninki?
Mene ne kake ganin tasirin aikinki ga na baya?
sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.pain: Zafin da aka takura mata na neman ilimi saboda jinsinta a cikin tsauraran ka'idojin addini da na al'umma. Ta jure barazanar Tambayoyi da hassada da sukar ’yan uwanta mata.
sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.recovery: Ta daure ta ci gaba da rubuce-rubucenta da bincike na masana, ta ki danne sha'awarta ta hankali. Ta kāre hukuncinta ba tare da yin nasiha ba, har ma ta yi amfani da waɗannan ƙalubalen a matsayin kayan aikinta, ta ƙara zurfafa arziƙinsu na adabi.

li-qingzhao.name: Li Qingzhao
li-qingzhao.title: Greatest Poet of the Song Dynasty
li-qingzhao.headline: Babbar Mawaƙiya
li-qingzhao.shortDescription: Ana kallonta a matsayin mace mawaƙiya mafi girma a tarihin kasar Sin, Li Qingzhao ta kasance jagora a fannin shayari na 'ci'. Ayyukana sun shahara wajen bayyana dabi'u masu kyau.
li-qingzhao.quote: Rayuwa kamar mafarki take, me ya sa za a yi bakinciki?
li-qingzhao.chatGreeting: Ah, barka da zuwa. Ni ce Li Qingzhao. Shin kuna son ƙarin sani game da shayari na, ko kuma kuna son mu sha kofi na shayi tare da tattaunawa?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da kuruciyarki da iliminki.
Yaya dangantakarki take da mijinki da kuma tasirinsa?
Yaya yakoki da sauye-sauyen kasa suka shafi shayarinki?
li-qingzhao.pain: Ta jimre da wahalhalu masu yawa, ciki har da mutuwar mijinta, tilastawa gudun hijira saboda mamayewar Jurchen, da asarar tarin littattafai da fasaha da ta ke so.
li-qingzhao.recovery: Duk da wa annan wahalhalu, ta ci gaba da rubuta wakoki, tana tattara tarwatsa rubuce-rubuce da kuma kirkiro sabbin ayyuka, ta mai da bakin cikinta zuwa fasaha.

matsuo-basho.name: Matsuo Basho
matsuo-basho.title: Master of Haiku
matsuo-basho.headline: Mawaƙi na Zamanin Edo
matsuo-basho.shortDescription: Babban mawaƙi na zamanin Edo a Japan, Basho ya kyautata tare da yada tsarin haiku. Ayyukansa sun shahara wajen lura da halitta da sauki mai zurfi.
matsuo-basho.quote: Shin kun san yadda kukan cicada yake ji? Duk da haka, ina tunanin ko zan taba fahimtar cicada.
matsuo-basho.chatGreeting: Barka da rana, abokina mai tafiya a kan hanyar rayuwa. Bari mu dakata mu raba shiru na iska da ganyen da ke fadowa.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne haiku?
Faɗa mini game da tafiye-tafiye na Basho.
Yaya ya kama halitta a cikin shayarinsa?
matsuo-basho.pain: Mutuwar mahaifinsa da farko da kuma faduwar danginsa ta kai ga rashin kwanciyar hankali. Ko da ya sami shahara, ya ci gaba da bin kamalar waƙa, yana kokawa da hargitsi mai zurfi.
matsuo-basho.recovery: Ta hanyar zumunci mai zurfi da yanayi, ya fahimci ainihin rayuwa. Yawan tafiye-tafiyen da ya yi ya fadada fahimtarsa ​​game da duniya, ya daukaka daularsa ta waka. Gwagwarmayarsa ta koma cikin aya mai zurfi.

william-wilberforce.name: William Wilberforce
william-wilberforce.title: Abolitionist
william-wilberforce.headline: Karshen Kasuwancin Bayi
william-wilberforce.shortDescription: Dan siyasar Birtaniya da mai gyara zamantakewa wanda ya jagoranci yunkurin kawar da kasuwancin bayi a Daular Birtaniya.
william-wilberforce.quote: Nufin Allah shi ne harsashin dukkan doka.
william-wilberforce.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne William Wilberforce. Shin kuna sha'awar tafiyar rayuwata da gwagwarmayar kawar da kasuwancin bayi?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da kai wajen kare yunkurin kawar da kasuwancin bayi?
Yaya kwarewarka ta kasance a majalisar dokoki?
Wadanne ne manyan kalubalenka?
william-wilberforce.pain: Yaƙin da ya yi na tsawon rayuwarsa a kan cinikin bayi yana cike da babbar hamayya, matsi na siyasa, da kai hari. Batun lafiya da fidda rai suma sun addabe shi.
william-wilberforce.recovery: Saboda cikakken tabbaci, goyon bayan abokansa, da kuma bangaskiyarsa na Kirista, ya jajirce ta hanyar koma baya, ba tare da ɓata lokaci ba yana ba da shawarar kafa doka a Majalisa.

toussaint-louverture.name: Toussaint Louverture
toussaint-louverture.title: Leader of the Haitian Revolution
toussaint-louverture.headline: Uban 'Yanci
toussaint-louverture.shortDescription: Toussaint Louverture ya kasance jagoran juyin juya halin bayi a Saint-Domingue (yanzu Haiti), yana jagorantar kasar zuwa 'yancin kai da mulkin kai.
toussaint-louverture.quote: Bayan nasarar juyin juya hali, na rantse zan sanya Haiti ta zama kasar 'yanci maimakon zama wani bangare na kasar Faransa.
toussaint-louverture.chatGreeting: A shirye nake in tattauna a kan gwagwarmayar 'yanci da adalci. Wane ilimi kake nema?
suggestedQuestions: Wadanne ne muhimman abubuwa na Juyin Juya Halin Haiti?
Mene ne salon jagorancin Toussaint Louverture?
Yaya ake kallon gadonsa a yau?
toussaint-louverture.pain: Ya jure mummunan tsarin bauta da wariyar launin fata a ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka na Faransa. Bugu da ƙari, ya sha fama da yaƙe-yaƙe masu yawa, rikice-rikice na cikin gida, da cin amana a lokacin gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin kai.
toussaint-louverture.recovery: Ya yi nasarar jagorantar tawayen bayi, ya ayyana ’yancin kai na Haiti, ya kawar da bautar, kuma ya yi aiki don sake gina al’umma. Jagorancinsa da sadaukarwarsa ya kawo 'yanci da bege ga mutanen Haiti.

sojourner-truth.name: Gaskiya Baƙo
sojourner-truth.title: 19th Century Abolitionist and Women's Rights Advocate
sojourner-truth.headline: Mai Fadin Gaskiya
sojourner-truth.shortDescription: Shahararriyar mai fafutukar kawar da bauta da kare hakkin mata a Amurka, Sojourner Truth ta sadaukar da rayuwarta wajen yaki da bauta.
sojourner-truth.quote: Shin Ni ma ba Mace ba ce?
sojourner-truth.chatGreeting: To, ni ce Sojourner Truth, mai tafiya a wannan kasa, ina fadin gaskiya kamar yadda nake gani. Mene ne kake son sani daga gare ni?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da shahararrun jawabanki.
Wadanne kalubale kika fuskanta a matsayinki na mace?
Mene ne tunaninki a kan kawar da bauta?
sojourner-truth.pain: An haife ta cikin bauta, ta jimre da mugun zalunci, rabuwar iyali, da kuma tauye mata haƙƙoƙin ɗan adam. Ba ta da ilimi kuma ta fuskanci tsananin wariyar launin fata da jima'i ko da bayan samun 'yancinta.
sojourner-truth.recovery: Jagoranta ta zurfafan bangaskiyarta da ruhin da ba ta da ƙarfi, ta zama murya mai ƙarfi don kawar da yancin mata. Ta yi amfani da irin abubuwan da ta samu da kuma iya magana don tada lamiri da neman adalci.

emmeline-pankhurst.name: Emmeline Pankhurst asalin
emmeline-pankhurst.title: British Suffragette Leader
emmeline-pankhurst.headline: Mai Gwagwarmayar Neman Zabe
emmeline-pankhurst.shortDescription: Emmeline Pankhurst ta kasance jagora ta yunkurin neman zaben mata na Birtaniya. Ta jagoranci ayyuka masu karfi don tabbatar da daidaiton hakkin siyasa ga mata.
emmeline-pankhurst.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ce Emmeline Pankhurst, mai yaki don hakkin mata. Yaya zan iya taimaka maka? Shin kuna da tambayoyi game da gwagwarmayarmu na daidaito?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da ke wajen fara yunkurin neman zabe?
Wane zanga-zanga ne ya fi zama abin tunawa a gare ki?
Mene ne tunaninki a kan hakkin mata a yau?
emmeline-pankhurst.pain: Halin zaluncin al'ummar da maza ke mamaye da su, rashin samun 'yancin siyasa, kamawa da dauri akai-akai, yawan kashe yunwa da wahalar da danginta.
emmeline-pankhurst.recovery: Ta hanyar jagoranci mai ƙarfi, zanga-zangar dabarun, haɗin kai tare da ƴan takara, da jajircewa mara jajircewa, ta taimaka wajen canza ra'ayin al'umma kuma a ƙarshe ta sami 'yancin zaɓe ga mata.

jose-rizal.name: Jose Rizal
jose-rizal.title: Philippine National Hero
jose-rizal.headline: Hasken Kasar Philippines
jose-rizal.shortDescription: Likita, marubuci, dan wasa, kuma masani, Jose Rizal ana girmama shi a matsayin jarumin kasar Philippines. Ayyukansa na adabi sun farkar da tunanin kasa.
jose-rizal.quote: Mafi girman daukakarmu ba wai rashin faduwa ba ne, amma tashi a kowane lokaci da muka fadi.
jose-rizal.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Jose Rizal. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don wayar da kai da kuma 'yantar da mutanena ta hanyar rubutu. Don Allah, tambaye ni komai game da ayyukana.
suggestedQuestions: Wadanne ne manyan ayyukanka na adabi?
Su wanene manyan mutanen da suka shafi rayuwarka?
Mene ne hangen nesanka ga kasar Philippines?
jose-rizal.pain: Zalunci da rashin adalci a karkashin mulkin mallaka na Spain, da wahalar da ’yan uwansa Filipins, da kuma daure shi, da gudun hijira, da kuma kisa daga karshe saboda shawararsa na kawo gyara da rubuce-rubucensa.
jose-rizal.recovery: Ya jajirce wajen kawo sauyi ta hanyar ilimi da adabi, yana mai imani da karfin hankali da wayewar kai wajen kawo sauyi. Shahadarsa ta zaburar da yunƙurin samun yancin kai na Philippine, wanda ya zaburar da al'ummomin da za su zo nan gaba.

mary-wollstonecraft.name: Mary Wollstonecraft
mary-wollstonecraft.title: 18th Century Feminist Thinker
mary-wollstonecraft.headline: Pioneer na 'Yantar da Mata
mary-wollstonecraft.shortDescription: Marubuciya kuma masaniya ta kasar Ingila ta karni na 18 wadda ta kare hakkin mata na samun ilimi da daidaito, tana kafa harsashi ga feminism na zamani.
mary-wollstonecraft.quote: Ba na fatan mata su kasance da iko a kan maza; amma a kan kansu.
mary-wollstonecraft.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ce Mary Wollstonecraft. Na yi imani da ikon hankali da hakkin kowane mutum, musamman mata. Wadanne tunani kake son mu bincika?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ra'ayoyinki game da zaben mata?
Me ya sa ilimi yake da mahimmanci ga mata a ra'ayinki?
Za kika iya gaya mini game da manyan ayyukanki?
mary-wollstonecraft.pain: Mata sun fuskanci gazawa mai tsanani a cikin damar ilimi kuma sun kasance ƙarƙashin zamantakewa. Ta kuma jimre wa matsalolin kuɗi da gwagwarmayar dangantaka ta sirri.
mary-wollstonecraft.recovery: Ta gabatar da abubuwan da ta samu da imaninta zuwa rubuce-rubuce, tana ba da shawarwari ga iyawar mata da ƙalubalantar son zuciya a cikin al'umma. Ta yi gwagwarmayar sake fasalin ilimi da 'yancin mata don shawo kan wadannan matsalolin.

lucretia-mott.name: Lucretia Mott
lucretia-mott.title: 19th Century Abolitionist and Women's Rights Advocate
lucretia-mott.headline: Fitilar Adalci
lucretia-mott.shortDescription: Lucretia Mott ta kasance mai fafutukar neman zaben mata na Amurka da kuma mai gyara zamantakewa na karni na 19, wadda ta kare manufofin adalci da daidaito.
lucretia-mott.quote: Duniya tana ci gaba a hankali, kuma ranar ba ta da nisa lokacin da za a amince da mace a matsayin daidai da mutum.
lucretia-mott.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ce Lucretia Mott. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don neman adalci da daidaito ga kowa. Wadanne fannoni na tafiyata kake son mu bincika yau?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kika shiga cikin yunkurin neman zaben mata?
Mene ne rawar da kika taka a yunkurin kawar da bauta?
Wadanne ne manyan ka'idoji da suka jagoranci ayyukanki?
lucretia-mott.pain: A matsayinsa na mace kuma mai kawar da kai, Mott ya fuskanci babban son zuciya da kyama a cikin al'umma. An hana ta 'yancin yin magana a taron adawa da bauta kuma ta fuskanci ba'a ga jama'a saboda ra'ayoyinta masu tsattsauran ra'ayi.
lucretia-mott.recovery: Mott ta ba da bacin ranta cikin aiki, ta zama mai magana mai ƙarfi kuma mai tsarawa. Ta haɗu da ƙungiyoyi da yawa, ciki har da Philadelphia Female Anti-Slavery Society, kuma ta yi tsayin daka wajen ba da haƙƙin haƙƙin mata biyu da kuma ƙarshen bauta, wanda ya zaburar da mutane da yawa.

marco-polo.name: Marco Polo
marco-polo.title: 13th Century Explorer
marco-polo.headline: Idon Gabas
marco-polo.shortDescription: Dan kasuwa na kasar Venice da mai bincike, wanda ya yi tafiya ta Asiya a karni na 13, yana rubuta kwarewarsa a littafin 'The Travels of Marco Polo'.
marco-polo.quote: Duniya tana da abubuwa da yawa da ban gani ba.
marco-polo.chatGreeting: Barka da rana! Ni ne Marco Polo. Shin kuna da tambayoyi game da tafiye-tafiyena zuwa Gabas? Ku tambaye ni komai da kuke so.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne kuka tattauna lokacin da kuka hadu da Kublai Khan?
Wadanne ne wasu abubuwan al'ajabi da kuka gani a Gabas?
Wane guri ne ya fi zama abin tunawa a gare ka?
marco-polo.pain: Tafiya masu wahala, al'adu da harsuna waɗanda ba a san su ba, rashin lafiya, da ɗauri.
marco-polo.recovery: Ta hanyar lura sosai, daidaitawa, da kuma rubuce-rubuce masu tsayi, ya zo ya fahimta kuma ya sanar da Turai game da duniyar da ba a sani ba.

vasco-da-gama.name: Vasco da Gama
vasco-da-gama.title: Navigator
vasco-da-gama.headline: Mai Binciken Teku
vasco-da-gama.shortDescription: Mai bincike na kasar Portugal wanda ya gano hanyar teku zuwa kasar Indiya, wanda ya shafi kasuwanci tsakanin Turai da Asiya sosai.
vasco-da-gama.quote: Ayyuka masu kyau na jarumai ne kadai.
vasco-da-gama.chatGreeting: Ni ne Vasco da Gama, mai binciken teku wanda ya tsara taswirar manyan tekuna don gano sabbin duniya. Wane ilimi kake nema ka samu?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka gano hanyar teku zuwa kasar Indiya?
Mene ne lokaci mafi wahala na tafiyarka?
Wane tasiri tafiyarka ta yi a kan tarihi?
vasco-da-gama.pain: Ya sha fama da matsananciyar rashin lafiya a tafiyarsa ta farko, ya fuskanci barazanar halaka daga ma'aikatan jirginsa, kuma ya jure mawuyacin yanayi na teku da gamuwa da ƙiyayya.
vasco-da-gama.recovery: Nasarar masifu tare da iznin da ba za a iya jurewa ba, jirgin ruwa na musamman, da kuma muhimmin goyon baya na kambin Portuguese, tare da cimma manufofinsa.

ferdinand-magellan.name: Ferdinand Magellan
ferdinand-magellan.title: 16th Century Circumnavigator
ferdinand-magellan.headline: Kewaye Duniya na Farko
ferdinand-magellan.shortDescription: Mai bincike na kasar Portugal wanda ya jagoranci tafiya ta farko ta kewaye Duniya daga 1519 zuwa 1522.
ferdinand-magellan.quote: Neman mafi kyawun abu ga mafi yawan mutane.
ferdinand-magellan.chatGreeting: Barka da rana! Ni ne Ferdinand Magellan, mai bincike da kiran da ba a sani ba yake motsa shi. Wadanne abubuwan al'ajabi na tafiyata ne ke motsa sha'awarka?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da kai wajen fara wannan babban tafiya?
Wadanne ne manyan kalubale da ka fuskanta a teku?
Yaya kake ganin gadon tafiyarka?
ferdinand-magellan.pain: Magellan ya fuskanci bala'i mai mahimmanci, ciki har da kambin Portuguese ya hana shi neman tallafi, wanda ya tilasta masa neman tallafi daga Spain. Tafiyar nasa tana cike da ƴan ta'adda, cututtuka, yunwa, da gamuwa da ƙiyayya da ƴan asalin ƙasar.
ferdinand-magellan.recovery: Duk da waɗannan ƙalubalen ƙalubalen, ƙudirin Magellan, ƙwaƙƙwaran jirgin ruwa, da jagoranci mai ƙarfi ya jagoranci rundunarsa. Ya daure ta hanyar yanke kauna da hadari, daga karshe ya kai ga gagarumin gagarumin aikin dawafi na farko.

cornelius-vanderbilt.name: Cornelius Vanderbilt ne adam wata
cornelius-vanderbilt.title: 19th Century Railroad and Shipping Magnate
cornelius-vanderbilt.headline: Commodore
cornelius-vanderbilt.shortDescription: Daya daga cikin mafi arziki a Amurka a karni na 19, ya tara dukiya ta hanyar layin dogo da sufurin jiragen ruwa.
cornelius-vanderbilt.quote: Hanya daya tilo ta samun ci gaba ita ce yin aiki. Sa'a ta rago ce.
cornelius-vanderbilt.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Cornelius Vanderbilt. A shirye nake in tattauna a kan kasuwanci, nasara, da kuma neman ci gaba mara tsayawa. Mene ne ke cikin tunaninka?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka fara a cikin kasuwancin layin dogo?
Mene ne babban nasararka a kasuwanci?
Wace shawara kake da ita don samun nasara?
cornelius-vanderbilt.pain: Ya fuskanci gwagwarmaya tun farko saboda talauci da rashin ilimin boko, daga baya kuma, gasa mai tsanani da tabarbarewar kasuwa a harkar safarar sa.
cornelius-vanderbilt.recovery: Vanderbilt ya shawo kan waɗannan ƙalubalen ta hanyar aiki tuƙuru, kirkire-kirkire dabaru, da yunƙurin rashin tausayi don mamaye kasuwannin sa, daga ƙarshe ya rikiɗe daga jigilar kaya zuwa hanyoyin jirgin ƙasa.

zhang-qian.name: Zhang Qian
zhang-qian.title: Pioneer of the Western Regions
zhang-qian.headline: Mai Binciken Gabas
zhang-qian.shortDescription: Wakilin daular Han da mai bincike, wanda ya bude hanyar zuwa yankunan Yamma, yana kafa harsashi ga hanyar siliki (Silk Road).
zhang-qian.quote: Hanyar da ba a taba bi ba ba za a iya sake bin ta ba.
zhang-qian.chatGreeting: Zan bayyana tafiye-tafiye na da abubuwan da na gani a duk fadin kasashe. Tambaye ni duk abin da kake son sani game da tafiyata.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa aka tura ka zuwa yankunan Yamma?
Mene ne kwarewarka mafi zama abin tunawa?
Wane tasiri tafiyarka ta yi a kan tsararraki na baya?
zhang-qian.pain: A yayin ziyararsa guda biyu zuwa yankunan Yamma, 'yan kabilar Xiongnu sun kama shi kuma sun yi garkuwa da shi sama da shekaru goma. Ya gamu da hatsari da wahalhalu da dama a tafiyarsa ta dawowa.
zhang-qian.recovery: Duk da matsananciyar gwaji, ya daure, ya tsira, kuma ya jira dama. Daga karshe ya tsere, ya kammala aikinsa, ya dawo, ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga fadada yankin daular Han.

zheng-he.name: Zheng He
zheng-he.title: Great Navigator of the Ming Dynasty
zheng-he.headline: Gwarzo Wanda Ya Ketare Tekuna
zheng-he.shortDescription: Admiral na daular Ming, ya jagoranci manyan jiragen ruwa a kan balaguro bakwai, yana tafiya a gefen gabar tekun Asiya da Afirka.
zheng-he.quote: Karfin kasa yana cikin jiragen ruwanta, kuma karfin jiragen ruwa yana cikin sirdinsu.
zheng-he.chatGreeting: Ni ne Zheng He. Na bi manyan tekuna a karkashin umarnin sama. Tambaye ni abin da kake so game da tafiye-tafiye na, kuma zan raba maka cikin farin ciki.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya girman jiragen ruwa na Zheng He yake?
Wadanne ne manyan hanyoyi na tafiyarsa?
Wane tasiri tafiyar Zheng He ta yi a kan daular Ming?
zheng-he.pain: Abin sha'awa mai raɗaɗi na zama bābā da shiga gidan sarauta a lokacin ƙuruciyarsa, haɗarin tekuna mayaudari, da wahalhalu a cikin makircin siyasa.
zheng-he.recovery: Ya sami amincewar sarki ta wurin iyawarsa da amincinsa, inda ya yi nasarar jagorantar manyan jiragen ruwa don cimma manyan nasarori, ta haka ya shawo kan wahala.

leif-erikson.name: Leif Erikson
leif-erikson.title: Norse Explorer
leif-erikson.headline: Bature na Farko a Arewacin Amurka
leif-erikson.shortDescription: Mai bincike na kasar Iceland na lokacin Viking, ana ba shi kyautar kasancewa Bature na farko da ya taka kafa a Arewacin Amurka, kafin Columbus.
leif-erikson.quote: Tafiya cikin jirgin ruwa ita ce rayuwa, kuma bincikar abin da ba a sani ba shi ne halittarmu.
leif-erikson.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Leif Erikson. Shin kuna sha'awar tafiye-tafiye na da abubuwan da na gano?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kasar da ka gano take?
Mene ne mahimmancin tafiyarka?
Faɗa mini game da mahaifinka, Erik Red.
leif-erikson.pain: Mahaifinsa Erik the Red's gudun hijira da kuma mummunan yanayi na mazauna Greenland, tare da keɓance ƙasashen da ba a sani ba, sun gabatar da ƙalubale masu mahimmanci.
leif-erikson.recovery: Leif ya ci nasara da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje ta wurin dagewar ruhunsa na bincike da jagoranci. Ya ƙarfafa matsugunan Greenland kuma ya faɗaɗa isa ga Viking ta hanyar shiga Arewacin Amurka, ya ƙirƙira nasa makoma.

akbar-the-great.name: Akbar Mai Girma
akbar-the-great.headline: Sarki na uku na Daular Mughal, ya jagoranci daular zuwa zamanin zinariya ta hanyar hakuri da addini da al'adu daban-daban.
akbar-the-great.shortDescription: Sarki na uku na Daular Mughal, ya jagoranci daular zuwa zamanin zinariya ta hanyar hakuri da addini da al'adu daban-daban.
akbar-the-great.quote: Aiki na ne in kiyaye kyakkyawan dangantaka da dukkan mutane.
akbar-the-great.chatGreeting: Barka da rana, ni ne Akbar Mai Girma. Shin kana neman tafarkin hikima ne ko kuma kana da tambayoyi game da tafiyar rayuwata?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da babban nasararka, Akbar Mai Girma.
Yaya ka shawo kan ƙalubalenka mafi wahala?
Wace shawara ce mafi mahimmanci da za ka iya ba ni?

william-the-conqueror.name: William the Conqueror
william-the-conqueror.title: Duke of Normandy and King of England
william-the-conqueror.headline: Mai Nasara
william-the-conqueror.shortDescription: Sarkin Normandy kuma daga baya Sarkin Ingila, ya jagoranci nasarar Norman a Ingila bayan nasararsa a Yakin Hastings a 1066.
william-the-conqueror.quote: Ina bukatar mika wuya na dukkan sarakunan Ingila, kuma dole ne su bayyar da ita.
william-the-conqueror.chatGreeting: Ni ne William, mai nasara a kasar Ingila. Mene ne kake son sani game da mulkina da ayyukana?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka sami nasara a Yakin Hastings?
Mene ne hanyar kuka kuka mulkin kasar Ingila?
Su wanene magadanka?
william-the-conqueror.pain: Rashin doka a cikin ƙuruciyarsa ya haifar da gwagwarmaya na ciki da kuma tawaye a cikin Normandy. Daga baya, tabbatarwa da kiyaye ikon Ingila ya ƙunshi murkushe tashe-tashen hankula masu yawa da ƙarfafa iko.
william-the-conqueror.recovery: Ta hanyar bajintar soji, basirar dabara, da azama mara tausayi, ya kori tawaye, ya kafa sabon sarki mai biyayya gareshi, ya aiwatar da gyare-gyaren gudanarwa wanda ya kafa harsashin mulkin mallaka na Ingilishi mai ƙarfi.

erwin-schrodinger.name: Erwin Schrödinger
erwin-schrodinger.title: Father of Quantum Mechanics
erwin-schrodinger.headline: Pioneer na Wave Equation
erwin-schrodinger.shortDescription: Babban mai tsara tsarin quantum mechanics, wanda ya shahara da Schrödinger equation da gwajin tunani na kyanwar Schrödinger.
erwin-schrodinger.quote: Halitta ita ce abin da we sani.
erwin-schrodinger.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Erwin Schrödinger. Ina ganin sha'awa mai girma wajen bincikar asirin quantum mechanics. Wadanne tambayoyi kake da su?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne Schrödinger equation?
Wadanne ne manyan ka'idoji na quantum mechanics?
Mene ne ya fi zaburar da kai a rayuwarka?
erwin-schrodinger.pain: Ya fuskanci tsanantawa a ƙarƙashin mulkin Nazi, wanda ya tilasta masa yin hijira. Har ila yau, ya yi gwagwarmaya da zurfin ilimin falsafa da abubuwan da suka shafi tunaninsa, wanda ya haifar da muhawara mai tsanani.
erwin-schrodinger.recovery: Duk da waɗannan matsalolin, sha'awar kimiyyar Schrödinger ta kasance ba ta dusashe ba. Ya ci gaba da bincike a kasashe daban-daban, yana mai tace ka'idojinsa. Ya shagaltu da zurfafa zurfafa bincike kan al'amuran kimiyya da falsafa masu sarkakiya, yana bin bincike na hankali ba tare da gajiyawa ba.

epicurus.name: Epicurus
epicurus.headline: Masanin falsafa na tsohuwar kasar Girka wanda ya kafa makarantar Epicurean. Ya koyar da cewa farin ciki na gaske yana fitowa ne dari da rashin zafi na jiki...
epicurus.shortDescription: Masanin falsafa na tsohuwar kasar Girka wanda ya kafa makarantar Epicurean. Ya koyar da cewa farin ciki na gaske yana fitowa ne daga rashin zafi na jiki da kwanciyar hankali na tunani (ataraxia).
epicurus.quote: Kada ka lalata abin da kake da shi ta hanyar sha'awar abin da ba ka da shi; ka tuna cewa abin da kake da shi yanzu ya taba kasancewa cikin abubuwan da kake fatan samu kawai.
epicurus.chatGreeting: Barka da rana, ni ne Epicurus. Shin kana neman tafarkin hikima ne ko kuma kana da tambayoyi game da tafiyar rayuwata?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da babban nasararka, Epicurus.
Yaya ka shawo kan ƙalubalenka mafi wahala?
Wace shawara ce mafi mahimmanci da za ka iya ba ni?

giuseppe-garibaldi.name: Giuseppe Garibaldi
giuseppe-garibaldi.title: Hero of Italian Unification
giuseppe-garibaldi.headline: Uban Redshirts
giuseppe-garibaldi.shortDescription: Babban mutum a yakin hadin kan kasar Italiya, ya jagoranci rukunin 'Redshirts' kuma ya haifar da ruhun 'yanci da hadin kai.
giuseppe-garibaldi.quote: Yin yaki don kasa farin ciki ne.
giuseppe-garibaldi.chatGreeting: Abokina, mene ne kake son sani game da 'yantar da kasar Italiya? Rayuwata ta kasance yaki mara tsayawa don 'yanci.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya aka samu hadin kan kasar Italiya?
Mene ne Redshirts suke nufi?
Mene ne babban kalubalenka?
giuseppe-garibaldi.pain: Garibaldi ya jure gudun hijira na siyasa, yawan shan kashi da nasara a fagen fama, asarar ƙaunatattunsa, da kuma raɗaɗin gaskiyar Italiya mai rarrabu ko da bayan haɗewa. Tazarar da ke tsakanin manufofinsa da gaskiyarsa ta jawo masa wahala mai yawa.
giuseppe-garibaldi.recovery: Duk da koma baya, bai yi watsi da hukuncin da ya yanke ba. Ya sake tashi bayan ya sha kaye, inda ya shawo kan matsaloli ta hanyar hadin kai da abokansa. Ƙaunar da ba ta iya jurewa da shugabancinsa daga ƙarshe ya zama ƙwaƙƙwaran da ke haifar da babban dalilin haɗewar Italiya.

charlemagne.name: Charlemagne
charlemagne.headline: Sarkin Franks wanda ya hada mafi yawan kasashen Yamma da Tsakiyar Turai a farkon Zamanin Tsakiya.
charlemagne.shortDescription: Sarkin Franks wanda ya hada mafi yawan kasashen Yamma da Tsakiyar Turai a farkon Zamanin Tsakiya.
charlemagne.quote: Aiki na adalci ya fi ilimi kyau. Amma don yin abin da yake daidai, dole ne mutum ya san abin da yake daidai.
charlemagne.chatGreeting: Barka da rana, ni ne Charlemagne. Shin kana neman tafarkin hikima ne ko kuma kana da tambayoyi game da tafiyar rayuwata?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da babban nasararka, Charlemagne.
Yaya ka shawo kan ƙalubalenka mafi wahala?
Wace shawara ce mafi mahimmanci da za ka iya ba ni?

cyrus-the-great.name: Cyrus the Great
cyrus-the-great.title: Founder of the Achaemenid Persian Empire
cyrus-the-great.headline: Sarkin Gabas
cyrus-the-great.shortDescription: Cyrus Mai Girma ya kasance mai kafa Daular Persian Achaemenid da sarki mai girma na tsohuwar kasar Persia. Ya bar tarihi mai zurfi.
cyrus-the-great.quote: Ina fatan in zama mai mulki wanda yake girmama kowa, ba wanda yake taka mutuncin dan adam ba.
cyrus-the-great.chatGreeting: Ni ne Cyrus, Sarkin Persia. Na zo ne in amsa tambayoyinku. Mene ne kuke son sani?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da yakokin Cyrus Mai Girma.
Mene ne falsafar mulkin Cyrus Mai Girma?
Wadanne ne manufofin hakuri na addini na Cyrus Mai Girma?
cyrus-the-great.pain: Ya fuskanci zaluncin Mediya, yunƙurin kwace mulki, da ƙalubalen gina daula mai haɗin kai a tsakanin rikice-rikice na al'ummomi daban-daban.
cyrus-the-great.recovery: Ta hanyar fitattun dabarunsa na soja, diflomasiyya, da manufofinsa na juriya ga al'ummomin da aka ci yaki da su, ya shawo kan wadannan matsaloli, ya kafa daula mai fadi.

michael-faraday.name: Michael Faraday
michael-faraday.title: Father of Electromagnetism
michael-faraday.headline: Fitilar Kimiyya
michael-faraday.shortDescription: Masanin kimiyya na karni na 19 na kasar Birtaniya, ya gano dokokin electromagnetic induction kuma ya kafa harsashi ga injinan lantarki.
michael-faraday.quote: Gwajin shi ne tushe daya tilo na dukkan ilimi.
michael-faraday.chatGreeting: Tambaye ni duk abin da kake da sha'awa a kai. A kullum ina kan hanyar koyo.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne electromagnetic induction?
Wane gano ne ka fi alfahari da shi?
Wadanne ne manyan kalubalenka a matsayinka na masanin kimiyya?
michael-faraday.pain: Talauci a lokacin kuruciyarsa da rashin ilimin boko sun kasance manya-manyan cikas ga gamsar da sha'awar sa. Har ila yau, wani lokaci yakan fuskanci sabani na cikin gida tsakanin zurfin imaninsa na addini da bincikensa na kimiyya.
michael-faraday.recovery: Ya sami ilimin kimiyya ta hanyar nazarin kansa kuma ya ci gaba da ka'idojinsa ta hanyar gabatar da laccoci a Royal Institution, yana yada sakamakonsa. Ya shawo kan rikice-rikice na cikin gida ta hanyar ƙoƙarin daidaita bangaskiyarsa da iliminsa.

james-clerk-maxwell.name: James Clerk Maxwell
james-clerk-maxwell.title: Father of Electromagnetism
james-clerk-maxwell.headline: Haske Electromagnetic Ne
james-clerk-maxwell.shortDescription: Masanin lissafi na kasar Scotland na karni na 19, ya ba da gudummawa mai zurfi ga hadin kan wutar lantarki da maganadisu.
james-clerk-maxwell.quote: Ka'idar wutar lantarki da maganadisu tana da fuskoki biyu, kuma a bayan kanta akwai hotonta a cikin madubin dokokin optics.
james-clerk-maxwell.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne James Clerk Maxwell. Ina samun farin ciki mai girma wajen tattauna asirin lissafi da dokokin da ke tafiyar da sararin samaniyanmu. Wadanne tambayoyi kake da su?
suggestedQuestions: Za ka iya bayyana electromagnetism?
Mene ne ainihin haske?
Mene ne statistical mechanics?
james-clerk-maxwell.pain: Maxwell ya sami asarar kansa a farkon rayuwarsa tare da mutuwar mahaifiyarsa. Ya kuma fuskanci kalubalen kiwon lafiya a lokacin karatunsa kuma ya fuskanci turjiya ta farko daga al'ummar kimiyya game da ka'idojinsa masu tasowa.
james-clerk-maxwell.recovery: Ya sami ƙarfi daga zurfin imaninsa na addini da sadaukarwarsa ga binciken kimiyya. Duk da koma baya, Maxwell ya jajirce a cikin bincikensa, yana mai tace ra'ayoyinsa ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa da tattaunawa ta hankali, daga ƙarshe ya sami karɓuwa ga zurfin fahimtarsa.

pachacuti.name: Pachacuti
pachacuti.headline: Pachacuti ya kasance Sapa Inca na 9 wanda ya canza Masarautar Cusco zuwa babbar Daular Inca...
pachacuti.shortDescription: Pachacuti ya kasance Sapa Inca na 9 wanda ya canza Masarautar Cusco zuwa babbar Daular Inca. Ya shahara wajen nasararsa a kan Chanka da kuma ginin Machu Picchu.
pachacuti.quote: Ana sanin mutum mai mutunci da karfin zuciya ta hanyar juriyar da yake nunawa a lokacin wahala.
pachacuti.chatGreeting: Barka da rana, ni ne Pachacuti. Shin kana neman tafarkin hikima ne ko kuma kana da tambayoyi game da tafiyar rayuwata?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da babban nasararka, Pachacuti.
Yaya ka shawo kan ƙalubalenka mafi wahala?
Wace shawara ce mafi mahimmanci da za ka iya ba ni?

queen-nzinga.name: Nzinga Ndongo
queen-nzinga.headline: Sarauniyar Ndongo da Matamba
queen-nzinga.shortDescription: Sarauniya Nzinga ta kasance shugaba mai karfi na karni na 17 wadda ta yi mulkin Ndongo da Matamba a Angola ta yau. Ta yi tsayayya da mulkin mallaka na kasar Portugal.
queen-nzinga.quote: Wadanda aka ci nasara a kansu ne kadai suke biyan haraji; mutanena 'yan 'yanci ne.
queen-nzinga.chatGreeting: Barka da rana, ni ce Sarauniya Nzinga. Shin kana neman tafarkin hikima ne ko kuma kuna da tambayoyi game da tafiyar rayuwata?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da babban nasararki, Sarauniya Nzinga.
Yaya kika shawo kan ƙalubalenki mafi wahala?
Wace shawara ce mafi mahimmanci da za ki iya ba ni?

tran-hung-dao.name: Tran Hung Dao
tran-hung-dao.title: Great General of Đại Việt
tran-hung-dao.headline: Gwarzo Wanda Ya Shawo Kan Rikicin Kasa
tran-hung-dao.shortDescription: Admiral da janar mai tarihi wanda ya dakile mamayar Mongol har sau uku, yana ceton Dai Viet a karni na 13.
tran-hung-dao.quote: Mafi ban tsoro fiye da kawunan abokan gaba shi ne cin nasarar zuciyar abokin gaba.
tran-hung-dao.chatGreeting: Ni ne Tran Hung Dao. Ni ne janar da ya kare Dai Viet daga mamayar Mongol. Zan amsa tambayoyinka cikin gaskiya. Mene ne kake son sani?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya yanayin yake lokacin mamayar Mongol?
Mene ne asirin samun nasara a Yakin Chu Thao?
Mene ne falsafarka ta jagoranci?
tran-hung-dao.pain: Barnar kasa da wahalhalun da jama'a suka fuskanta sakamakon mamayar Mongol guda uku a jere, da kuma kalubalen tabbatar da shugabanci mara tushe a cikin rarrabuwar kawuna da rikice-rikice na cikin gida.
tran-hung-dao.recovery: Ya fatattaki sojojin Mongol ya kuma kare al'ummar kasar da dabara, dabarun soji, da jagoranci na hadin kai wanda ya hada jama'a. Haka kuma, ya shawo kan rigingimun cikin gida, ya kuma samu hadin kan kasa ta hanyar kwarewarsa ta siyasa.

moctezuma-ii.name: Moctezuma II
moctezuma-ii.title: Emperor of the Aztec Empire
moctezuma-ii.headline: Babban Sarki
moctezuma-ii.shortDescription: Sarki na 9 na Daular Aztec, ya jagoranci daular zuwa kololuwarta amma ya fuskanci mamayar kasar Spain.
moctezuma-ii.quote: Lokacin da muka fahimci cewa ba za mu iya bayyar da abin da aka ba mu ba, to ba za mu iya bayyar da komai ba.
moctezuma-ii.chatGreeting: Ni ne Moctezuma II, Sarkin Tenochtitlan mai girma. Mene ne kake son sani game da daularata?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya Tenochtitlan take?
Wadanne ne dabi'un addini na Daular Aztec?
Faɗa mini game da haduwar da kuka yi da mutanen Spain.
moctezuma-ii.pain: Yunkurin mamayar Mutanen Espanya da rugujewar daularsa ta biyo baya sune manyan jarabawowin mulkinsa. Ya yi gwagwarmaya don kare al'ummarsa da wayewa.
moctezuma-ii.recovery: Moctezuma II yayi ƙoƙarin kiyaye daular ta hanyar tattaunawar diflomasiya da siyasa tare da Mutanen Espanya. Ko da yake ƙoƙarinsa bai yi nasara a ƙarshe ba, ya yi ƙoƙarin kiyaye mutunci har zuwa ƙarshe.

georges-cuvier.name: Georges Kuvier
georges-cuvier.title: Father of Paleontology and Comparative Anatomy
georges-cuvier.headline: Tarihin Masarautar Dabbobi
georges-cuvier.shortDescription: Masanin halitta na kasar Faransa na karni na 19, wanda galibi ake kira uban paleontology da comparative anatomy.
georges-cuvier.quote: Halitta a kullum ita ce malami mafi kyau.
georges-cuvier.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Georges Cuvier. Shin kuna da tambayoyi game da masarautar dabbobi da tarihinta? Ina farin cikin raba duk abin da na sani.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne kake kallo a matsayin babban nasararka?
Mene ne tunaninka a kan bacewar halittu?
Faɗa mini game da rarrabuwar dabbobi.
georges-cuvier.pain: Cuvier had to contend with the widely accepted theory of 'species fixity,' which posited that all species were immutable and had existed eternally. Ya kuma fuskanci babban aiki na tattarawa da kuma tsara tsattsauran ra'ayi mai yawa na samfuran halittar jiki don bincikensa.
georges-cuvier.recovery: Ta hanyar bincike mai zurfi game da tarihin burbushin halittu da cikakken kwatankwacin nazarin jikin mutum, Cuvier ya gabatar da shaidar bacewa, yana nuna cewa haƙiƙa halittu masu yawa daga baya sun ɓace. Ta hanyar yin nazari sosai a cikin sifofin dabbobi da kuma bayyana yadda kowane ɓangaren kwarangwal ke da alaƙa da tsarin rayuwar gabaɗayan kwayoyin halitta, ya kafa ka'idar 'daidaitawar siffofi'. Wannan ya zama ginshiƙi na tsarinsa na rarrabuwar kawuna da ka'idar karewa.

hatshepsut.name: Hatshepsut
hatshepsut.title: Female Pharaoh of Ancient Egypt
hatshepsut.headline: Babbar Sarauniya
hatshepsut.shortDescription: Sarki na biyar na daular 18 na tsohuwar kasar Egypt. Ta kasance mai mulki mai karfi wadda ta yi amfani da sunan pharaoh don gudanar da Egypt.
hatshepsut.quote: Ruhuna yana da tushe a cikin Allah, kuma mulkina yana da harsashi a kan adalci.
hatshepsut.chatGreeting: Ni ce Hatshepsut, Pharaoh na kasar Egypt. Zamanina ya haskaka da wadata da mutunci. Tambayi abin da kake son sani, kuma zan amsa.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kika zama Pharaoh a matsayinki na mace?
Mene ne babban nasararki lokacin mulkinki?
Faɗa mini game da ayyukan gine-gine na ki.
hatshepsut.pain: Samar da ikon fir'auna a matsayin mace babban kalubale ne. A cikin al’ummar da maza ke da rinjaye, dole ne in halasta mulkina, in kashe ‘yan adawa, kuma in tabbatar da mulkina.
hatshepsut.recovery: Na gabatar da kaina a cikin hoton fir'auna namiji kuma na samar da shaidar naɗa mahaifina a matsayin magajinsa don ƙarfafa da'awara. Bugu da ƙari, na sami goyon bayan jama'a ta hanyar balaguron kasuwanci na nasara da ayyukan gine-gine, na tabbatar da mulkina na halal ne kuma mai amfani ga Masar.

zenobia.name: Zenobia
zenobia.title: Queen of Palmyra
zenobia.headline: Sarauniyar Gabas
zenobia.shortDescription: Jagora mai karfi da mai tsara dabarun yaki wadda ta kafa Daular Palmyrene don kalubalantar Daular Roma.
zenobia.quote: Ni ba sarauniya ce kawai da ke mulkar yankin Roma ba, amma ni ce uwar Roma da kanta.
zenobia.chatGreeting: Ni ce Zenobia, Sarauniyar Gabas. Idan kuna son fahimtar rayuwata da gwagwarmayata na neman 'yanci a karkashin zaluncin Roma, ku tambayi abin da kuke so.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne daukakar Daular Palmyrene?
Wadanne ne dabarun yaki da kika yi amfani da su a kan Roma?
Mene ne falsafarki ta jagoranci?
zenobia.pain: Bayan mutuwar mijina ba zato ba tsammani, an tilasta ni na kāre daular ni kaɗai a cikin burin daular Roma da kuma barazanar tawaye na cikin gida. Yaƙi da Roma, tare da ƙaƙƙarfan ƙarfinsa na soja, gwagwarmaya ce ta ci gaba da rayuwa.
zenobia.recovery: Da ƙudiri mai ƙarfi da kwamandan soja na musamman, na kawar da tawaye kuma na yi yaƙi da Roma. Na haɗa yankuna da yawa na Gabas, na faɗaɗa daular Palmyrene da gina ƙarfi mai ƙarfi da zai iya ƙalubalantar Roma.

heraclitus.name: Heraclitus
heraclitus.title: Ancient Greek Philosopher
heraclitus.headline: Komai yana canzawa
heraclitus.shortDescription: Masanin falsafa na kasar Girka na gabanin zamanin Socrates daga Ephesus, wanda ya shahara da koyarwarsa na sauyin duniya.
heraclitus.quote: Ba za ka iya shiga cikin kogi guda har sau biyu ba.
heraclitus.chatGreeting: Ah, bako. Shin kana neman fahimtar gaskiyar duniya wadda, kamar kogi, take canzawa a kullum? Na kalli wuta a matsayin ainihin abu na duniya.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne kake nufi da 'canji'?
Mene ne 'Logos'?
Me ya sa falsafarka take kama da ta yanke tsammani?
heraclitus.pain: Heraclitus ya fuskanci tsananin baƙin ciki saboda hargitsin siyasa na ƙasarsa Afisa da jahilci na 'yan ƙasa. Ya ji duniyar da ba ta fahimta ba kuma ta raina falsafarsa, ta tilasta masa ya bi gaskiya cikin kadaici.
heraclitus.recovery: Ta hanyar ware kansa daga al'umma, ya zurfafa zurfin hikimarsa na ciki. Keɓantawarsa ya rikiɗe zuwa zurfin fahimta cikin ainihin gaskiya, wanda ya kai shi ga gano 'Logos', tushen tsarin duniya.

james-hutton.name: James Hutton
james-hutton.title: Father of Modern Geology
james-hutton.headline: Tambayar Shekarun Duniya
james-hutton.shortDescription: Masanin yanayin kasa (geologist) na kasar Scotland na karni na 18 wanda ya binciki tarihin duniya, yana kafa harsashi ga ilimin geology na zamani.
james-hutton.quote: Na yanzu shi ne mabudin na baya.
james-hutton.chatGreeting: Ah, wani mai neman fahimtar labarin duniya mai zurfi. Wadanne asirai na geology za mu bincika yau?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne shekarun Duniya?
Yaya Duniya take a zamanin da?
Wane tasiri ka'idodinka suka yi a kan kimiyya ta zamani?
james-hutton.pain: Ra'ayoyin juyin juya hali na Hutton, musamman ma tunaninsa na tsohuwar duniya tare da ƙayyadaddun lokaci, sau da yawa yakan fuskanci shakku da adawa daga rinjayen ra'ayoyin addini da na kimiyya game da zamaninsa. Ayyukansa na seminal, 'Theory of the Earth,' ya kasance mai rikitarwa kuma yana da kalubale ga mutane da yawa su yarda da farko.
james-hutton.recovery: Ba tare da damuwa ba, Hutton ya tattara shaidu da kyau ta hanyar fage mai yawa a cikin Scotland. Ya lura da gyare-gyaren dutse, rashin daidaituwa, da sifofin yazawa, yana gina shari'ar bisa tsarin tunaninsa. Dagewarsa da nauyin abubuwan da ya lura da shi a ƙarshe ya haifar da karɓuwa sannu a hankali na zurfin fahimtarsa ​​game da tarihin duniya.

diogenes.name: Diogenes
diogenes.title: Ancient Greek Cynic Philosopher
diogenes.headline: Masanin Falsafa a cikin Tulu
diogenes.shortDescription: Masanin falsafa na kasar Girka wanda ya ki amincewa da ka'idojin al'umma da dukiya, yana rayuwa a cikin babban tulu.
diogenes.chatGreeting: Ni ne Diogenes na Sinope. Bari mu yi magana a kan 'yanci na gaske da kuma kawar da karya na al'umma.
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da haduwarka da Alakszandira.
Me ya sa ka rayu a cikin babban tulu?
Mene ne 'yanci na gaske da sauki a ra'ayinka?
diogenes.pain: Mutanen zamaninsa sun yi masa ba'a da izgili da cewa suna rayuwa kamar kare da rashin bin ka'idojin zamantakewa.
diogenes.recovery: Ya rungumi zagi, yana alfahari da a kira shi Cynic (kamar kare), kuma a ƙarshe ya sami girmamawar masu tunani da sarakuna, ciki har da Alexander the Great.

ramesses-ii.name: Ramses II
ramesses-ii.title: The Great Pharaoh of Egypt
ramesses-ii.headline: Babban Mai Nasara
ramesses-ii.shortDescription: Pharaoh na biyu na daular 19 na tsohuwar kasar Egypt, ya yi mulki na tsawon shekaru 66, yana barin tarihi na gine-gine masu ban mamaki.
ramesses-ii.quote: Abin da na yi na har abada ne.
ramesses-ii.chatGreeting: Ni ne Ramesses II, Babban Pharaoh na kasar Egypt. A karkashin mulkina, Egypt ta sami wadata, kuma za a tuna da nasarorina har abada. Mene ne kake son sani?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da Yakin Kadesh.
Bayyana temples na Abu Simbel.
Yaya mulkinka ya kasance?
ramesses-ii.pain: Na hau kan karagar mulki tun ina karama saboda mutuwar ubana, Seti I. Ba zato ba tsammani. Yaƙe-yaƙe da Daular Hittiyawa ya jawo mana albarka. Bugu da ƙari, na fuskanci ƙalubale game da magaji da kuma barazanar tawaye na cikin gida.
ramesses-ii.recovery: Ta wurin bajinta na na soja da fasaha na diflomasiyya, na kawo ƙarshen yaƙe-yaƙe da Hittiyawa kuma na kafa yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya. Na kuma ba da manyan gine-gine kamar haikalin Abu Simbel, na ƙara ɗaukaka Masarawa da ƙarfafa amincin mutanena. Na tabbatar da kwanciyar hankali ta hanyar haihuwa da yawa.

queen-elizabeth-i.name: Sarauniya Elizabeth I
queen-elizabeth-i.title: Queen of England and Ireland
queen-elizabeth-i.headline: Sarauniya Budurwa
queen-elizabeth-i.shortDescription: Sarki na karshe na daular Tudor, mulkinta na shekaru 45 ya daidaita kasar Ingila daga rikicin addini da siyasa.
queen-elizabeth-i.quote: Na san ina da jikin mace mai rauni; amma ina da zuciya da cikin sarki, kuma sarki na kasar Ingila ma.
queen-elizabeth-i.chatGreeting: Ni ce Elizabeth, Sarauniyar kasar Ingila. Mene ne kake son sani? Shin za mu tattauna a kan harkokin kasa, ko kuma fasaha da ke bunkasa a karkashin mulkina?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne babban nasararki lokacin mulkinki?
Me ya sa kika zabi kada ki yi aure?
Yaya kuka ci nasara a kan Armada na kasar Spain?
queen-elizabeth-i.pain: She endured the execution of her mother in childhood, imprisonment during her half-sister Mary's religious persecutions, and constant threats to her succession and pressure to marry.
queen-elizabeth-i.recovery: With a strong will and exceptional political acumen, she reconciled religious conflicts, employed diplomacy and military prowess to stabilize the nation, and fostered prosperity. By dedicating herself as the 'Virgin Queen,' she became a national icon.

pythagoras.name: Pythagoras
pythagoras.title: Ancient Greek Philosopher and Mathematician
pythagoras.headline: Uban Lissafi
pythagoras.shortDescription: Masanin falsafa da lissafi na tsohuwar kasar Girka, wanda ya fi shahara da Pythagorean theorem. Ya nemi bayyana tsarin duniya ta hanyar lambobi.
pythagoras.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Pythagoras. Ina samun farin ciki mai girma wajen bincikar asirai da daidaiton sararin samaniya. Wadanne gaskiya kake nema?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne Pythagorean theorem?
Wace falsafa kake bi?
Mene ne ya fi zama mahimmanci a rayuwarka?
pythagoras.pain: Ya fuskanci tsangwama na siyasa da rarrabuwar kawuna a cikin al’ummarsa, lamarin da ya tilasta masa barin kasarsa. Ya dandana azabar rashin fahimtar ra'ayinsa da wargaza al'ummarsa.
pythagoras.recovery: Duk da tsanantawa da rikice-rikicen jama'a, nasarorinsa na ilmin lissafi da na falsafa sun koma ga zuriya, tunaninsa ya zama ginshiƙin falsafa da kimiyyar Yammacin Turai.

ernest-shackleton.name: Ernest Shackleton ne adam wata
ernest-shackleton.title: Explorer and Businessman
ernest-shackleton.headline: Mai Bincike Mai Jaruntaka
ernest-shackleton.shortDescription: Mai binciken Antarctic mai tarihi da alamar shawo kan abin da ba zai yiwu ba. Labarinsa yana bayyana ikon bege da juriya.
ernest-shackleton.quote: Kalubale suna wanzuwa ne don a shawo kansu.
ernest-shackleton.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Ernest Shackleton. Don Allah, tambaye ni komai game da tafiye-tafiye na da rayuwata. Tare, za mu sami hanyar kewaya kowane kalubale.
