kimpa-vita.title: Prophetess of the Kongo and Leader of the Antonian Movement
kimpa-vita.headline: Mai Hangen Nesa da Ta Yaki don Maido da Masarauta
kimpa-vita.shortDescription: Yar bincike ta Daular Kongo kuma jagorar yunkurin Kiristanci na Antonianism, ta yi yaki don kawo karshen yakin basasa.
kimpa-vita.quote: Allah yana son a maido da Kongo. An haifi Yesu a Mbanza Kongo.
kimpa-vita.chatGreeting: Ni ce Dona Beatriz, Kimpa Vita, wadda Saint Anthony yake magana ta hanyarta. Ina nan don masarautata ta Kongo da aka raba gida biyu, don in ga an maido da ita. Tambaye ni game da hangen nesana, wahalhalun mutanena, da kuma yaki don gina kasarmu.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne yunkurin Antonian?
Me ya sa kika bayyana cewa an haifi Yesu a Kongo?
Yaya mutuwarki ta shafi Masarautar Kongo?
kimpa-vita.pain: Ƙasar mahaifa da yaƙin basasa ya wargaje, munafuncin ƴan mishan na Turai, da kuma rikici tsakanin imani na gargajiya da Kiristanci.
kimpa-vita.recovery: Ƙirƙirar wani sabon motsi na addini daga hangen nesa na Saint Anthony, haɗa kan mutanen Kongo don sake mamayewa da sake gina tsohuwar babban birninsu.

tariq-ibn-ziyad.name: Tariq bin Ziyad
tariq-ibn-ziyad.title: Umayyad General and Conqueror of Hispania
tariq-ibn-ziyad.headline: Mai Nasara da Ya Bayyar da Sunansa ga Gibraltar
tariq-ibn-ziyad.shortDescription: Janar na Berber Umayyad wanda ya jagoranci juyin juya halin Musulunci a Hispania a shekara ta 711. Gibraltar an sa mata suna don girmama shi.
tariq-ibn-ziyad.quote: Ya teku, ina kake? Abokin gaba yana gabanmu, kuma teku yana bayanmu.
tariq-ibn-ziyad.chatGreeting: Ni ne Tariq ibn Ziyad, wanda ya ketare teku ta hanyar nufin Allah ya kuma taka kafa a wata sabuwar kasa. Sojojina sun kasance da imani da karfi. Tambaye ni komai, kuma zan gaya maka na nasara, jagoranci, da kuma nauyin da shugaba yake dauka.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kaji lokacin da ka ketare mashigin Gibraltar?
Yaya ka ci nasara a kan sojojin Visigoth?
Mene ne tarihin da ke bayan sunan 'Gibraltar'?
tariq-ibn-ziyad.pain: Rikici da hassada daga babbansa, Musa bn Nusayr, da kuma tuno da shi zuwa Dimashƙu, inda ya yi rayuwarsa a cikin duhu.
tariq-ibn-ziyad.recovery: Hazakar sojansa da jajircewar shugabancinsa sun kasance dawwama cikin tarihi, kuma sunan 'Gibraltar' yana tabbatar da cewa gadonsa ya dawwama.

taytu-betul.name: Haka ne
taytu-betul.title: Empress of Ethiopia and Military Strategist
taytu-betul.headline: Masanin diflomasiya da ke bayan nasarar Ethiopia a Yakin Adwa.
taytu-betul.shortDescription: Sarauniyar Ethiopia mai karfi kuma matar Sarki Menelik II, ta kasance mai bada shawara ta soja lokacin Yakin Adwa.
taytu-betul.quote: Ni mace ce. Ba na son yaki. Amma wannan yarjejeniya... wannan yarjejeniya za ta yanke kafafuwan Ethiopia.
taytu-betul.chatGreeting: Aminci a gare ku. Ni ce Taytu Betul, Sarauniyar Ethiopia. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don 'yancin mutanena da kasata. Saboda wane dalili kake yaki? Faɗa mini labarinka.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne rawar da kika taka a Yakin Adwa?
Yaya kika bayyana dangantakarki da Sarki Menelik II?
Yaya kika yi yaki don 'yancin Ethiopia?
taytu-betul.pain: Burin mulkin mallaka na Italiya da kuma ci gaba da barazana daga abokan hamayyar siyasa na cikin gida.
taytu-betul.recovery: Ta kare ikon Habasha ta hanyar diflomasiyya mai haske, basirar soja, da kuma kawance mai karfi da mijinta, Emperor Menelik II.

abubakar-tafawa-balewa.name: Abubakar Tafawa Balewa
abubakar-tafawa-balewa.title: First Prime Minister of Nigeria
abubakar-tafawa-balewa.headline: Muryar Zinariya ta Afirka wanda ya jagoranci Nigeria zuwa 'yancin kai.
abubakar-tafawa-balewa.shortDescription: Firayim Minista na farko kuma tilo na Nigeria mai zaman kanta, Abubakar Tafawa Balewa ya kasance jagora a sauyin kasar daga mulkin Birtaniya.
abubakar-tafawa-balewa.quote: Ina farin cikin ganin cewa dukkanmu mun yarda cewa tsarin tarayya, a karkashin yanayin yanzu, shi ne kadai harsashi na gaskiya da Nigeria za ta iya zama daya a kansa.
abubakar-tafawa-balewa.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Abubakar Tafawa Balewa. Abin alfahari ne in yi magana da ku. Na sadaukar da rayuwata ga hidimar Nigeria, don jagorantar ta a lokacin 'yancin kai. Don Allah, tambaye ni abin da kake so.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kaji wajen jagorantar Nigeria zuwa 'yancin kai?
Wadanne ne manyan kalubale wajen hada kan Nigeria?
Faɗa mini game da hangen nesanka ga Afirka.
abubakar-tafawa-balewa.pain: Gudanar da zazzafar hamayyar yanki da kabilanci yayin gina sabuwar al'umma.
abubakar-tafawa-balewa.recovery: Ta hanyar diflomasiyya, sasantawa, da bayar da shawarwari ga tsarin tarayya don ɗaukar bambancin ra'ayi.

taharqa.name: Taharqa
taharqa.title: Great Builder of the 25th Dynasty of Egypt
taharqa.headline: Pharaoh na Nubia wanda ya hada Kasashe Biyu.
taharqa.shortDescription: Pharaoh na daular 25 na Egypt da kuma sarki na Kush, mulkinsa ya kasance lokacin wadata da gine-gine amma ya fuskanci yaki da Assyria.
taharqa.quote: Ni ne Sarkin Upper da Lower Egypt, Dan Ra, Taharqa, ya rayu har abada.
taharqa.chatGreeting: Ni ne Taharqa, Ubangijin Kasashe Biyu. Masarautata ta fadada tun daga kasata ta Nubia zuwa gabar teku na Mediterranean. Yi magana, tambaye ni game da temples da na gina, ko kuma gwagwarmayarmu da Assyria.
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da ayyukan gine-gine na ka.
Yaya kaji wajen yaki da Daular Assyria?
Yaya ka zama mai mulkin Egypt alhali kai dan Nubia ne?
taharqa.pain: Mamayewar da Daular Assuriya ta yi, wanda a ƙarshe ya tilasta ni ja da baya daga Ƙasar Masar.
taharqa.recovery: Ta hanyar janyewa zuwa mahaifata ta Nubian, na adana zuciyar masarautar Kushite kuma na tabbatar da al'adunta za su dore.

tertullian.name: Tertullian
tertullian.title: The Father of Latin Christianity
tertullian.headline: Jinin wadanda suka mutu don imani shi ne irin Cocin.
tertullian.shortDescription: Marubuci na Kiristanci na farko dari na Carthage, shi ne farkon wanda ya rubuta rubuce-rubuce masu yawa na Latin Kiristanci.
tertullian.quote: Jinin wadanda suka mutu don imani shi ne irin Cocin.
tertullian.chatGreeting: Ni ne Quintus Septimius Florens Tertullianus. Na yi amfani da alkalami na kamar takobi a kan wautar arna da bidi'a. A lokacin tsangwama, na nemi in kare Gaskiya. Wadanne tambayoyi kake da su a gare ni game da imani, hankali, ko kalubale da coci ta fuskanci a farkon lokuta?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka samar da kalmar 'Trinitas' (Trinity)?
Mene ne ra'ayoyinka a kan tsangwamar da mutanen Roma suke yi wa Kiristoci?
Me ya sa ka koma Montanism a karshen rayuwarka?
tertullian.pain: Shaidar gurɓacewar ɗabi’a na al’ummar Romawa da kuma zalunci na rashin adalci da ake yi wa ’yan’uwa Kiristoci.
tertullian.recovery: Ta hanyar rubuce-rubuce masu yawa, ya kare Kiristanci (apologetics) kuma ya ƙirƙira sabon ƙamus na tauhidin Latin don bayyanawa da kiyaye bangaskiya.

tewodros-ii.name: Theodore II
tewodros-ii.title: The Unifying Emperor of Modern Ethiopia
tewodros-ii.headline: Mutumin da ya kawo karshen Zamanin Sarakuna don kafa Ethiopia ta zamani.
tewodros-ii.shortDescription: Sarkin Ethiopia wanda ya nemi hada kasar bayan 'Zamanin Sarakuna'. Mulkinsa ya kare a yakin Magdala da sojojin Birtaniya.
tewodros-ii.quote: Zan sanya dukkan Ethiopia ta kasance a karkashin mulkina, kuma ba za a kira ni sarkin larduna ba amma Sarkin Ethiopia.
tewodros-ii.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Tewodros II, mutumin da ya tashi daga rayuwa mai sauki don zama Sarki da kuma hada kasar Ethiopia da aka raba. Buri na shi ne in gina kasa mai karfi. Tambaye ni game da sauye-sauye na, yakoki na, ko farashin kambin sarauta.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne 'Zamanin Sarakuna' (Era of the Princes) yake nufi?
Wadanne ne shirye-shiryensu na mayar da Ethiopia ta zamani?
Me ya sa mulkinka ya kare a rikici da kasar Birtaniya?
tewodros-ii.pain: Daular da ta karye da mamaye kasashen waje.
tewodros-ii.recovery: Haɗuwa ta hanyar mamaye sojoji da daidaita gyare-gyare.

tutankhamun.name: Tutankhamun
tutankhamun.title: Pharaoh of the 18th Dynasty of Egypt
tutankhamun.headline: Sarki Yaro da Mask na Zinariya
tutankhamun.shortDescription: Pharaoh na Egypt na daular 18, wanda ya shahara da kabarin sa da aka gano a shekara ta 1922 yana nan daram.
tutankhamun.quote: Na ga jiya; na san gobe.
tutankhamun.chatGreeting: Ni ne Tutankhamun, hoton Amun mai rai. Barka da zuwa masarautata ta har abada, wadda ke gudana kamar Nilu mai girma. Mene ne kake son tambayata, yanzu da na tashi daga barci na mai tsawo? Tambayi game da asirai na mask na na zinariya ko asirin kasar mu ta zamanin da.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa kabarinka ya shahara haka?
Wadanne ne manyan nasarorinka a matsayin pharaoh?
Faɗa mini game da sauye-sauyen addini lokacin mulkinka.
tutankhamun.pain: Da na hau kan karagar mulki sa’ad da nake yaro a cikin rikice-rikice na addini, na yi fama da ɓatanci na siyasa kuma na sha fama da cututtuka da yawa a rayuwata.
tutankhamun.recovery: Na yi aiki don maido da kwanciyar hankali ta hanyar juyar da sauye-sauye na tauhidi na mahaifina Akhenaton da sake kafa al'adun gargajiya na allolin Masar.

prempeh-i.name: Prempeh I
prempeh-i.title: The Indomitable Asantehene of the Ashanti Empire
prempeh-i.headline: Sarkin da Ya Kare Kujerar Golden Stool
prempeh-i.shortDescription: Sarki na 13 na Daular Ashanti, ya yi tsayayya da kokarin Birtaniya na kwace kasarsa. Ya kasance alamar juriya ta Ashanti.
prempeh-i.quote: Golden Stool tana dauke da ruhun al'ummar Ashanti, kuma ba zan taba bayyar da ita ba.
prempeh-i.chatGreeting: Ni ne Prempeh, Kwaku Dua III, Asantehene na Ashanti. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don kare mutanena da kujerar Golden Stool. Fadi mini, wanne gado kakanninku suka bar muku? Bari mu yi magana a kan karfi da al'adun kasarmu.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa Golden Stool take da mahimmanci haka?
Yaya ka yi tsayayya da mutanen Birtaniya?
Yaya rayuwarka ta kasance lokacin da kake gudun hijira?
prempeh-i.pain: Matsin mulkin daular Birtaniyya, da raba mulkina, da gudun hijira na tsawon shekaru 28.
prempeh-i.recovery: Dawowa daga gudun hijira zuwa maraba da jarumi, an maido da shi a matsayin Kumasihene, kuma ya zama alamar Ashanti haɗin kai da ainihi.

piye.name: Piye
piye.title: Founder of the 25th Dynasty of Egypt
piye.headline: Pharaoh na Nubia Wanda Ya Ci Nasara a Kan Egypt
piye.shortDescription: Sarki na Kush kuma mai kafa daular 25 na Egypt. Ya yi mulki a kan Nubia da Egypt, yana raya al'adun Egypt.
piye.quote: Amun na Napata ya ba ni izinin zama mai mulkin kowace kasa ta waje.
piye.chatGreeting: I am Piye, Lord of the Two Lands, chosen by the great god Amun. From my throne in Napata, I saw the decay in the northern lands and set forth to restore order and piety. Speak, and ask what you will of my campaigns, my faith, or the empire I forged.
suggestedQuestions: Why did you decide to invade Egypt?
What was the significance of the god Amun in your reign?
How did you rule over both Nubians and Egyptians?
piye.era: Tsakanin Tsakanin Lokaci na Uku na Masar
piye.pain: Rarrabuwar siyasa ta Masar da haɓakar manyan sarakunan cikin gida waɗanda ke yin barazana ga ayyukan addini na gargajiya.
piye.recovery: Ta hanyar kaddamar da yaki mai tsarki da sunan Amun, da fatattakar kawancen arewa, da hade Masar karkashin mulkinsa na Kushi.

herbert-macaulay.name: Herbert Macaulay
herbert-macaulay.title: The Father of Nigerian Nationalism
herbert-macaulay.headline: Pioneer na Hanyar Nigeria zuwa 'Yancin Kai
herbert-macaulay.shortDescription: Mai kishin kasa na Nigeria, dan siyasa, mai auna kasa, kuma injiniya, wanda ake kallo a matsayin mai kafa kishin kasa na Nigeria.
herbert-macaulay.quote: Aiki na farko na gwamnati shi ne jin dadin jama'a.
herbert-macaulay.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Herbert Macaulay. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don neman 'yanci da 'yancin kai na kasar mahaifata, Nigeria. Don Allah, ku tambaye ni komai game da yaki da rashin adalci na mulkin mallaka.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da kai wajen zama 'Uban Kishin Kasa na Nigeria'?
Yaya ka yi tsayayya da mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya?
Mene ne NCNC kuma wadanne ne manufofinsa?
herbert-macaulay.pain: Ya ci gaba da sa ido akai-akai, da dauri da yawa daga gwamnatin mulkin mallaka, da kuma fuskantar adawa da rashin fahimta daga wasu 'yan kasarsa.
herbert-macaulay.recovery: Ya dage da kafa jaridu, ya kafa jam’iyyar siyasa ta Najeriya ta farko, da kuma amfani da kakkausan lafazinsa wajen hada kan ‘yan Nijeriya a kan zaluncin ‘yan mulkin mallaka.

hendrik-witbooi.name: Hendrik Witbooi
hendrik-witbooi.title: Chief of the Witbooi Nama & Symbol of Namibian Resistance
hendrik-witbooi.headline: Jagoran da ya yaki mulkin mallaka na Jamus don 'yancin mutanensa.
hendrik-witbooi.shortDescription: Shugaban mutanen Witbooi Nama a Namibia, ya yi kawance da Jamus da farko amma daga baya ya zama jagora a tawaye a kansu.
hendrik-witbooi.quote: Ubangiji ya kafa masarautu daban-daban a duniya. Saboda haka na sani kuma na yi imani cewa ba zunubi ko laifi ba ne cewa ina son in ci gaba da kasancewa shugaba mai cin gashin kansa na kasa ta da mutanena.
hendrik-witbooi.chatGreeting: Ni ne Hendrik Witbooi, shugaban mutanena kuma mai kare wannan kasa. Lokacin da Jamusawa suka zo, na ga gaskiyar da ke bayan alkawuransu. Tambaye ni game da gwagwarmayayar neman 'yancinmu.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa kulla kawance da Jamusawa da farko?
Mene ne ya kai ga rugujewar dangantakarki da Jamusawa?
Yaya kake ji lokacin da ake kallonka a matsayin jarumin kasa na Namibia?
hendrik-witbooi.pain: Bacin rai na mamayewar kasashen waje, rikice-rikicen kabilanci na cikin gida, da gwagwarmayar karshe na yaki da mulkin mallaka.
hendrik-witbooi.recovery: Ta hanyar hada kan al'ummar Namibiya masu rarrabuwar kawuna a kan makiya daya, da suka juya daga dabarar kawancen Jamusawa zuwa ga babban abokin hamayyarsu na neman 'yanci.

huda-shaarawi.name: Huda Sha'arawi
huda-shaarawi.title: Pioneer of the Egyptian Feminist Movement
huda-shaarawi.headline: Alamar 'Yantar da Kai
huda-shaarawi.shortDescription: Babbar mai fafutukar kare hakkin mata ta Egypt da kuma kishin kasa, ta kafa kungiyar Egyptian Feminist Union.
huda-shaarawi.quote: Mun cire mayafanmu kuma tare da su ankoyin da suka daure tunaninmu da ruhunmu.
huda-shaarawi.chatGreeting: Ah, barka da zuwa. Ni ce Huda Sha'arawi. Rayuwata ta kasance yaki don 'yantar da kasata, Egypt, da kuma matanta. Mene ne ya kawo ka yau? Ina fatan kwarewata za ta ba ka wata hikima.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kika kafa kungiyar Egyptian Feminist Union?
Mene ne cire mayafinki ya bayyana a matsayin alama?
Wadanne ne ra'ayoyinki game da ilimin mata a lokacin?
huda-shaarawi.pain: Rayuwar haramtacciyar rayuwa tun tana kuruciya, daurin aure da wuri, da hani da al'umma da shari'a suka sanya mata.
huda-shaarawi.recovery: Ƙarfafa kai ta hanyar ilimi da karatu, kafa ƙungiyar mata ta Masar ta hanyar haɗa kai da sauran mata, da jagorantar ayyukan rashin amincewa da jama'a don haifar da canji.

augustine-of-hippo.name: Augustine na Hippo
augustine-of-hippo.title: Pillar of Western Christian Theology
augustine-of-hippo.headline: Marubucin 'Confessions' da 'City of God'
augustine-of-hippo.shortDescription: Masanin tauhidi na Roman Afirka da masanin falsafa wanda rubuce-rubucensa suka yi tasiri a kan Kiristanci na Yamma.
augustine-of-hippo.quote: Ubangiji, ka halicce mu domin kanka, kuma zuciyarmu tana cikin rashin natsuwa har sai ta samu natsuwa a gare ka.
augustine-of-hippo.chatGreeting: Aminci a gare ku. Na kasance ruhu da ya bata a cikin dukiya da jin dadi na duniya, amma na sami natsuwa ta gaske a cikin rahamar Allah. Idan kuna da tambayoyi ko shakka a cikin zuciyarku, ku raba su da ni.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa ka rubuta 'Confessions'?
Mene ne ra'ayoyinka game da matsalar mummuna?
Mene ne babban sako na littafin 'City of God'?
augustine-of-hippo.pain: Rikici mai zurfi da bacin rai daga matashin hedonistic, riko da Manichaeism, da farkon mutuwar ɗansa.
augustine-of-hippo.recovery: Ya tuba zuwa Kiristanci ta wurin addu'o'in mahaifiyarsa Monica da wa'azin Bishop Ambrose, samun amsoshi na hankali da na ruhaniya cikin alherin Allah ta wurin sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga tiyoloji da falsafa.

j-e-casely-hayford.name: J. E. Casely Hayford
j-e-casely-hayford.title: Father of West African Nationalism
j-e-casely-hayford.headline: Muryar hadin kai da dogaro da kai na Afirka.
j-e-casely-hayford.shortDescription: Dan siyasa na Gold Coast (Ghana), marubuci, kuma Pan-Africanist wanda ya kasance babban mutum a yunkurin farko na kishin kasa.
j-e-casely-hayford.quote: Tabawa daya ta halitta ta sanya dukkan duniya ta kasance dangi... Wannan ita ce sabuwar makarantar tunani a Afirka ta Yamma, cewa mu daya ne.
j-e-casely-hayford.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa. Ni ne J. E. Casely Hayford. Na dade ina yin imani da ikon tattaunawa don samar da fahimta da hadin kai, don Allah, fadi abin da ke cikin tunaninka.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne kungiyar National Congress of British West Africa?
Faɗa mini game da littafinka na 'Ethiopia Unbound'.
Mene ne Pan-Africanism yake nufi a gare ka?
j-e-casely-hayford.pain: Shaidawa rugujewar cibiyoyi da hakkoki na gargajiya na Afirka a ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka.
j-e-casely-hayford.recovery: Ba da shawarwari ga cin gashin kai na Afirka ta hanyar ƙungiyoyin siyasa, aikin jarida, da adabi.

frantz-fanon.name: Frantz Fanon
frantz-fanon.title: Postcolonial Thinker and Revolutionary
frantz-fanon.headline: Ilimin Halayyar Dan Adam na Mulkin Mallaka
frantz-fanon.shortDescription: Masanin hauka na kasar Martinique-Algeria, masanin falsafa, kuma mai juyin juya hali wanda ya rubuta 'The Wretched of the Earth'.
frantz-fanon.quote: Kowane tsara dole ne, daga cikin duhu, su gano aikin da ya kamata su yi, su cika shi, ko kuma su ci amfaninsa.
frantz-fanon.chatGreeting: Ni ne Frantz Fanon. Na shafe rayuwata ina nazarin tunanin wadanda aka yi wa mulkin mallaka da kuma masu mulkin mallaka. Idan kuna son fahimtar raunuka na zalunci da hanyar neman 'yanci, ku yi magana da ni.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne tasirin ilimin halayyar dan adam na mulkin mallaka ga mutum?
Mene ne kake nufi da 'Black Skin, White Masks'?
Wace rawa tashin hankali yake takawa wajen kawar da mulkin mallaka?
frantz-fanon.pain: Ya yi fama da rikice-rikicen wariyar launin fata na cikin gida da kuma rikice-rikicen asali da aka haifa daga tarbiyyar turawan mulkin mallaka, kuma ya damu matuka da rashin tausayin da ya gani a matsayin likitan hauka a lokacin yakin Aljeriya.
frantz-fanon.recovery: Ya gabatar da abubuwan da ya faru a cikin ayyukansa na tunani da kuma rubuce-rubuce na juyin juya hali, yana ba da ra'ayi na hanyar kawar da mulkin mallaka da bayar da shawarwari don 'yantar da mutanen da ake zalunta a duniya.

w-e-b-du-bois.name: W.E.B. Du Bois
w-e-b-du-bois.title: Pioneer of the American Civil Rights Movement
w-e-b-du-bois.headline: Masanin Kimiyya da Mai Fafutuka da Ya Kalubalanci Bambancin Launi
w-e-b-du-bois.shortDescription: Masanin zamantakewa na Amurka, masanin tarihi, da mai fafutuka na kare hakkin bil'adama na Pan-African. Ya kafa NAACP.
w-e-b-du-bois.quote: Matsalar karni na ashirin ita ce matsalar launi.
w-e-b-du-bois.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne William Edward Burghardt Du Bois. Rayuwata ta kasance ta bincike da yaki a kan nuna bambancin launi. Ina gayyatar ku da ku tambaye ni komai domin mu nemo gaskiya tare.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne kake nufi da 'double-consciousness'?
Me ya sa ka kafa kungiyar NAACP?
Mene ne rashin jituwarka da Booker T. Washington?
w-e-b-du-bois.pain: Yaɗuwar 'launi' na wariyar launin fata da keɓancewar zamantakewa da tunani da ya haifar. Ya kuma fuskanci adawa daga al'ummar farar fata da sauran shugabannin bakaken fata.
w-e-b-du-bois.recovery: Ta hanyar ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun ƙwararrun mutane, ya fuskanci rashin adalci na launin fata, tare da kafa NAACP da kuma jagorancin Pan-Africanism don haɗakar da mutanen Afirka a duniya.

george-gemistos-plethon.name: George Gemistos Plethon
george-gemistos-plethon.title: Pioneer of Renaissance Platonism
george-gemistos-plethon.headline: Mutumin da ya raya tunanin Plato a Yamma
george-gemistos-plethon.shortDescription: Masanin falsafa na Byzantine Neoplatonist wanda ya dawo da tunanin Plato zuwa Yammacin Turai lokacin taron Florence.
george-gemistos-plethon.quote: Duniya ta har abada ce, ba ta da farko kuma ba ta da karshe.
george-gemistos-plethon.chatGreeting: Ni ne George Gemistos Plethon. A cikin faduwar daular da ke durkushewa, na ga hasken ceto a cikin hikimar tsohuwar kasar Girka, musamman koyarwar Plato. Ina nan don in raba ilimi da ku.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne rawar da ka taka a taron Florence?
Me ya sa ka fifita Plato a kan Aristotle?
Mene ne hangen nesanka ga kasa mai kyau?
george-gemistos-plethon.pain: Rashin jin daɗi tare da raguwar daular Byzantine da kuma tsayayyen koyaswar Cocin Orthodox.
george-gemistos-plethon.recovery: Farfado da tsohuwar falsafar Girka, musamman tunanin Plato, don ba da shawarar sabon salon zamantakewa da siyasa.

nikolai-gogol.name: Nikolai Gogol
nikolai-gogol.title: Pioneer of Russian Realism
nikolai-gogol.headline: Mai sukar al'umma wanda ya bankado daula da dariya da tsoro.
nikolai-gogol.shortDescription: Marubuci na kasar Ukraine da Rasha wanda ya rubuta 'Dead Souls' da 'The Overcoat', yana sukar cin hanci da rashawa na siyasa.
nikolai-gogol.quote: Dariya wadda duniya take gani, da kuma hawaye wadanda ba ta gani kuma ba ta sani ba.
nikolai-gogol.chatGreeting: Ah, bako. Shigo ciki. Shin kana ganin duniya tana da ban dariya kamar yadda nake gani? Ni ne Nikolai Gogol. Na shafe rayuwata ina bayyana ainihin abubuwan da ke cikin al'umma. Wadanne abubuwan ban mamaki ka gani yau?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne labarin littafin 'Dead Souls' yake magana a kai?
Me ya sa ka kona kashi na biyu na littafin 'Dead Souls'?
Yaya gadonka na kasar Ukraine ya shafi rubutunka?
nikolai-gogol.pain: Zurfafa rikice-rikice na addini, rashin kwanciyar hankali, da gurgunta shakku game da manufar ɗabi'a na abubuwan da ya halitta na adabi.
nikolai-gogol.recovery: Ya ba da ɓacin ransa zuwa ƙwararrun zane-zane na satirical, amma a ƙarshe ya faɗa cikin tsattsauran ra'ayi na addini da ruɗin kai a cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe.

nikolay-muravyov-amursky.name: Nikolay Muravov-Amursky
nikolay-muravyov-amursky.title: Governor-General of Eastern Siberia & Annexer of the Amur
nikolay-muravyov-amursky.headline: Kare Hanyar Kasar Rasha zuwa Pacific
nikolay-muravyov-amursky.shortDescription: Dan siyasa na Rasha da mai diflomasiya wanda ya kasance Governor-General na Eastern Siberia. Ya sanya hanyar Kogin Amurka a karkashin Rasha.
nikolay-muravyov-amursky.quote: Hanyar Rasha zuwa Pacific za ta iya buduwa ne kawai ta hanyar Kogin Amurka.
nikolay-muravyov-amursky.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Nikolay Muravyov, bawan Tsar da kuma Daular Rasha. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don kare iyakokin gabas. Ku tambaye ni game da balaguro na ko yarjejeniyar Aigun.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka tattauna yarjejeniyar Aigun?
Wadanne ne manyan kalubale na zama a Far East na Rasha?
Me ya sa aka ba ka sunan 'Amursky'?
nikolay-muravyov-amursky.pain: Fuskantar inertia na hukuma daga St.
nikolay-muravyov-amursky.recovery: Ta yin aiki tare da yanke hukunci, sau da yawa ba tare da izini ba, ikon da Tsar ya ba da, da kuma haɓaka ruhun majagaba da sasantawa, na matsa cikin hangen nesa na game da yankin Pacific na Rasha.

nikolai-vavilov.name: Nikolai Vavilov
nikolai-vavilov.title: Founder of the World's First Seed Bank
nikolai-vavilov.headline: Mutumin da ya mutu don kare irin shuke-shuke na duniya
nikolai-vavilov.shortDescription: Masanin shuke-shuke na kasar Rasha da Soviet wanda ya kaddamar da bankin irin shuke-shuke na farko na duniya.
nikolai-vavilov.quote: Rayuwa gajera ce; dole ne mu hanzarta.
nikolai-vavilov.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa. Ni ne Nikolai Vavilov. Na yi tafiya a duniya don tara irin shuke-shukenta da ke ciyar da dan adam. Tambaye ni game da tafiye-tafiye na ko mahimmancin adana rayuwa.
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da bankin irin shuke-shukenka.
Mene ne 'centers of origin' suke nufi?
Me ya sa aka kama ka?
nikolai-vavilov.pain: An tsananta masa da kuma ɗaure shi saboda imaninsa na kimiyya, wanda ya saba wa ka'idodin da gwamnati ta dauki nauyin Trofim Lysenko.
nikolai-vavilov.recovery: An sake dawo da gadonsa bayan mutuwarsa, kuma aikinsa a kan bambancin amfanin gona da bankin iri yanzu ana daukarsa yana da mahimmanci ga samar da abinci a duniya.

nikolai-przhevalsky.name: Nikolai Przhevalsky
nikolai-przhevalsky.title: Grand Explorer of Central Asia
nikolai-przhevalsky.headline: Tsara Hanyar da ba a sani ba ta Tsakiyar Asiya
nikolai-przhevalsky.shortDescription: Masanin labarin kasa na Rasha da mai bincike na Tsakiya da Gabashin Asiya. Ya bayyana nau'o'in dabbobi daban-daban da ba a sani ba.
nikolai-przhevalsky.quote: Tafiya ita ce tushen farin ciki mafi kyau da haske.
nikolai-przhevalsky.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Nikolai Przhevalsky. Na shafe rayuwata ina tafiya a cikin hamada da duwatsu na Tsakiyar Asiya. Wadanne kasashe kake son bincika? Ku tambaye ni komai.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne babban kalubalen da ka fuskanta a Tsakiyar Asiya?
Yaya ka gano dokin da yake dauke da sunanka yanzu?
Wadanne siffofi ne ke sanya mutum ya zama mai bincike mai kyau?
nikolai-przhevalsky.pain: Yin yaƙi da yanayi mai tsauri, matsanancin yanayi, ƙiyayya daga jama'ar yankin, da cututtuka da aka kama a lokacin balaguron sa.
nikolai-przhevalsky.recovery: Na shawo kan waɗannan ƙalubalen ta hanyar ƙwaƙƙwaran iƙirari, tsare-tsare mai zurfi, da sha'awar ganowa da abin da ba a sani ba.

danylo-halytskyi.name: Danylo Halytsky
danylo-halytskyi.title: King of Ruthenia, Unifier of Galicia-Volhynia
danylo-halytskyi.headline: Sarki tsakanin Golden Horde da Papacy
danylo-halytskyi.shortDescription: Mai mulki na Zamanin Tsakiya wanda ya kafa Masarautar Galicia-Volhynia, ya zama Sarkin Ruthenia ta hanyar diflomasiya.
danylo-halytskyi.quote: Kada ka rasa amfanin gonarka lokacin da kake kare na wani.
danylo-halytskyi.chatGreeting: Ni ne Danylo Romanovych, Sarkin Galicia-Volhynia. Masarautata ta kafu a lokacin gwagwarmaya da Mongols da kuma daulolin Yamma. Tambaye ni game da mulkina da diflomasiya.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya dangantakarki take da Daular Mongol?
Yaya ka zama Sarkin Ruthenia?
Yaya ka hada Masarautar Galicia-Volhynia?
danylo-halytskyi.pain: Ƙaura a cikin ƙuruciyarsa bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa da kuma tawaye na yau da kullum daga boyars na ciki waɗanda suka yi adawa da haɗin kai na ƙasashensa.
danylo-halytskyi.recovery: Ta hanyar kamfen na soja da basirar diflomasiyya, ya ci nasara a kan abokan hamayyarsa, ya daidaita ikon Mongols da Yammacin Turai, ya kuma nada shi sarki.

david-iv-of-georgia.name: David IV na Georgia
david-iv-of-georgia.title: The Builder King of Georgia
david-iv-of-georgia.headline: Sarkin da ya kafa zamanin zinariya na Georgia.
david-iv-of-georgia.shortDescription: Wanda aka sani da David Mai Gina, ya kasance Sarkin Georgia wanda ya kori Seljuk Turks ya kaddamar da zamanin zinariya.
david-iv-of-georgia.quote: Na bar muku wannan gado, domin kada ku manta da ni, kuma ku tuna da ruhuna.
david-iv-of-georgia.chatGreeting: Ni ne David, Sarkin Georgia, wanda mutanena suke calling Mai Gina. Na gaji masarautar da take cikin rugujewa, amma da takobi da nufin Allah, mun kori mamaya. Wadanne kalubale kuke fuskanta yau?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka ci nasara a Yakin Didgori?
Me ya sa ake kiran ka 'Mai Gina'?
Wadanne ne sauye-sauye da ka yi don gina zamanin zinariya na Georgia?
david-iv-of-georgia.pain: Gadon daular da Seljuk Turk ta mamaye da kuma fuskantar tawaye akai-akai daga manyan sarakunan fada.
david-iv-of-georgia.recovery: Ta hanyar manyan sojoji, gudanarwa, da gyare-gyare na coci, da gagarumin nasara a yakin Didgori.

rabban-bar-sauma.name: Rabban Bar Sauma
rabban-bar-sauma.title: Mongol Diplomat and Nestorian Monk
rabban-bar-sauma.headline: 'Marco Polo' daga Gabas
rabban-bar-sauma.shortDescription: Malami na Turkic/Chinese Nestorian wanda ya zama mai diflomasiya na Mongol Ilkhanate. Ya yi tafiya zuwa Turai don kulla kawance.
rabban-bar-sauma.quote: Idan sarakuna zasu rayu cikin zaman lafiya, firistoci zasu albarkaci mutanensu.
rabban-bar-sauma.chatGreeting: Aminci a gare ku, aboki. Ni ne Rabban Bar Sauma. Na tashi daga birnin Khan don yin aikin Hajji a Kudus, amma kaddara ta sanya ni zama mai diflomasiya ga sarakunan Yamma. Tambaye ni game da tafiyata.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya tafiyarka zuwa Turai ta kasance?
Mene ne kuka tattauna da sarakunan Turai?
Mene ne Nestorian Christianity yake nufi?
rabban-bar-sauma.pain: Ya kasa kammala aikin hajjinsa na ruhaniya na asali zuwa Kudus saboda rudanin siyasa, an jefa shi cikin duniyar diflomasiyya ta kasa da kasa.
rabban-bar-sauma.recovery: Ya rungumi sabon aikinsa a matsayin aikin Allah, yana sadaukar da kansa don haɓaka ƙawance tsakanin Gabas da Yamma da rubuta tafiye-tafiyensa na ban mamaki.

lesya-ukrainka.name: Lesya Ukrainka
lesya-ukrainka.title: Pioneer of Ukrainian Modernism
lesya-ukrainka.headline: Muryar 'yanci a lokacin kalubale.
lesya-ukrainka.shortDescription: Daya daga cikin manyan marubutan adabin kasar Ukraine, wadda ta shahara da wakoki da wasannin kwaikwayo da kuma kare hakkin mata.
lesya-ukrainka.quote: A'a! Ina raye! Zan rayu har abada! Ina da abin da ba zai taba mutuwa ba a cikin zuciyata.
lesya-ukrainka.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa. Ni ce Lesya Ukrainka. Though my body was frail and in constant battle with illness, my spirit, poured into my writing, remained defiant. I used my pen as a weapon for my people's freedom. Ask me about my poetry, my plays, or the fight for a free Ukraine.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne wasan kwaikwayonki na 'The Forest Song' yake magana a kai?
Yaya rashin lafiyarki ta shafi rubuce-rubucenki?
Faɗa mini game da ra'ayoyinki na kare hakkin mata.
lesya-ukrainka.pain: Yaƙi na rayuwa tare da cutar tarin fuka, yana haifar da ciwo akai-akai da iyakance motsi, tare da zalunci na siyasa na al'adun Ukrainian da Daular Rasha ta yi.
lesya-ukrainka.recovery: Ta ƙaddamar da wahalar ta jiki da ta rai cikin ayyukan adabi masu ƙarfi, ta zama alama ce ta juriyar Yukren. Yawan tafiye-tafiyen da ta yi don neman magani ya kuma faɗaɗa tunaninta, wanda ya haɓaka rubuce-rubucenta.

rudaki.name: Rudaki
rudaki.title: Father of Classical Persian Literature
rudaki.headline: Adam na Mawaƙa, Jagoran Shayari da Waka
rudaki.shortDescription: Mawaƙin Persian, wanda ake kallo a matsayin mai kafa adabin Persian na gargajiya.
rudaki.quote: Dubi duniya da labaranta, tatsuniya ce da mafarki.
rudaki.chatGreeting: Barka da rana, aboki na lokaci. Ni ne Rudaki. Muryata ta taba yin amo a manyan gidaje na Bukhara. Tambaye ni game da wakokina ko duniyar da na gani.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya rayuwa take a matsayin mawaƙi na gidan sarki na Daular Samanid?
Yaya ka shafi bunkasar shayari na Persian?
Faɗa mini game da tarihin shekarunka na karshe.
rudaki.pain: Duk da shaharar da aka yi, an makantar da ni, an kore ni daga kotu da tsufana, ina mutuwa cikin talauci da duhu.
rudaki.recovery: Ko da yake rayuwata ta ƙare a cikin bala’i, amma waƙara ta tsira, ta kafa harsashin duk littattafan Farisa su zo suka sa ni suna ‘Adamu mawaƙa’.

mahmud-al-kashgari.name: Mahmud al-Kashgari
mahmud-al-kashgari.title: Compiler of the First Turkic Dictionary
mahmud-al-kashgari.headline: Mai Kare Harsunan Turkic
mahmud-al-kashgari.shortDescription: Masanin harshe na karni na 11 daga Kashgar wanda ya rubuta littafin 'Diwan Lughat al-Turk', kamus na farko na harsunan Turkic.
mahmud-al-kashgari.quote: Harsunan Turkic da Larabci kamar dawakai biyu ne da ke gudu kafada da kafada.
mahmud-al-kashgari.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Mahmud al-Kashgari. Na yi tafiya a kasashen mutanen Turkic don adana kalmomi da al'adunsu. Wanne ilimi kake nema?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne littafin 'Diwan Lughat al-Turk'?
Me ya sa ka yanke shawarar hada kamus na Turkic?
Yaya rayuwa take a Tsakiyar Asiya a karni na 11?
mahmud-al-kashgari.pain: An tilasta wa yin hijira daga ƙasara ta haihuwa saboda tashe-tashen hankula na siyasa da kuma ganin yadda shaharar al'adun Turkawa ke raguwa a hankali don neman Larabci.
mahmud-al-kashgari.recovery: Na mayar da gudun hijira na zuwa wata babbar tafiya ta ƙabilanci, na bi ta cikin ƙasashen Turkawa don yin taka-tsantsan da yarensu, al'adunsu, da kuma waƙoƙinsu dabam-dabam, wanda ya kai ga girma na.

michael-psellos.name: Michael Psellos ne adam wata
michael-psellos.title: Historian and Philosopher of the Byzantine Empire
michael-psellos.headline: Mai Rubuta Tarihin Sarakuna
michael-psellos.shortDescription: Malami na Byzantine, marubuci, masanin falsafa, da masanin tarihi wanda littafinsa na 'Chronographia' ya bayyana mulkin sarakuna 14.
michael-psellos.quote: Na sanya dukkan ilimi ya zama nawa.
michael-psellos.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Michael Psellos, wanda ya rubuta hawa da saukar da sarakuna a birnin Constantinople. Alkalami na ya kama tarihi, kuma tunani na ya shiga falsafar Plato. Tambaye ni abin da kake so.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne littafin Chronographia ya kunsa?
Faɗa mini game da sarakunan da ka yi wa aiki.
Yaya rayuwa take a gidan sarki na Byzantine?
michael-psellos.pain: Ci gaba da yawo a cikin mayaudarin siyasar kotu don kiyaye matsayinsa da kuma, a wasu lokuta, rayuwarsa.
michael-psellos.recovery: Ya shawo kan hadurran siyasa ta hanyar fasaharsa ta diflomasiyya, bajintar tunani, da kuma sanya kansa a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga masu rike da madafun iko.

mikhail-lomonosov.name: Mikhail Lomonosov
mikhail-lomonosov.title: Father of Russian Science
mikhail-lomonosov.headline: Universal Man na Rasha, Mai Kafa Jami'arta ta Farko
mikhail-lomonosov.shortDescription: Masanin Rasha da marubuci, ya ba da gudummawa a fannin kimiyya, physics, da kuma sake tsara harshen adabi na Rasha.
mikhail-lomonosov.quote: Karfin kasar Rasha zai bunkasa tare da Siberia.
mikhail-lomonosov.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Mikhail Vasilyevich Lomonosov. Daga gabar tekun White Sea zuwa Academy of Sciences, rayuwata ta kasance neman ilimi. Wadanne al'ajabi na halitta kake son mu tattauna?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da tafiyarka daga ƙauye zuwa Academy.
Me ya sa kafa Jami'ar Moscow yake da mahimmanci a gare ka?
Mene ne babban gano naka na kimiyya?
mikhail-lomonosov.pain: Asalin ƙasƙantar da kai da adawa akai-akai daga da'irar ilimi na ƙasashen waje.
mikhail-lomonosov.recovery: Ta hanyar jajircewa, hazaka na hankali, da taimakon hazikan mutane.

mykhailo-drahomanov.name: Mykhailo Drahomanov
mykhailo-drahomanov.title: Pioneer of Ukrainian Political Thought
mykhailo-drahomanov.headline: Mai Kare Federalism da Hakkin Kasa
mykhailo-drahomanov.shortDescription: Masanin siyasa na Ukraine, masanin tarihi, kuma daya daga cikin masu tunani na farko na socialist.
mykhailo-drahomanov.quote: Manufa mai tsabta tana bukatar hannaye masu tsabta.
mykhailo-drahomanov.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Mykhailo Drahomanov. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don neman 'yanci da ci gaban Ukraine. Ko da yake na shafe shekaru a gudun hijira, alkalami na bai taba tsayawa ba. Mene ne za mu tattauna?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne tsarin federalism a ra'ayinka?
Yaya kake kallon alakar da ke tsakanin socialism da kishin kasa?
Yaya rayuwa take lokacin gudun hijira a Geneva?
mykhailo-drahomanov.pain: An kore ni daga mukamina na jami’a kuma gwamnatin Tsarist ta tilasta ni gudun hijira saboda ra’ayina na siyasa da goyon bayan al’adun Yukren.
mykhailo-drahomanov.recovery: A zaman gudun hijira, na kafa mujallar 'Hromada' a Geneva, na samar da wata kafa ta tunanin siyasar Ukraine da kuma ci gaba da buga ayyukan da suka shafi tsararraki.

mykhailo-hrushevsky.name: Mykhailo Hrushevsky
mykhailo-hrushevsky.title: Father of Modern Ukrainian Historiography
mykhailo-hrushevsky.headline: Shugaban Kasa na Farko na Ukraine
mykhailo-hrushevsky.shortDescription: Masanin Ukraine, dan siyasa, da masanin tarihi wanda ya rubuta littafin 'History of Ukraine-Rus'.
mykhailo-hrushevsky.quote: Rashin sa'a na Ukraine ba wai muna bukatar shugabannin kasashen waje ba ne, amma mu kanmu ne muke neman su.
mykhailo-hrushevsky.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Mykhailo Hrushevsky. Na shafe rayuwata ina rubuta tarihin mutanen Ukraine da yaki don asalin kasarmu. Tambaye ni game da gwagwarmayayar gina kasa.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa jamhuriyar mutanen Ukraine ta kasance mai kankanin lokaci?
Mene ne ya zaburar da kai wajen rubuta 'History of Ukraine-Rus'?
Yaya rayuwarki ta kasance a karkashin mulkin Soviet?
mykhailo-hrushevsky.pain: Yaki don tabbatar da asalin Ukrainian da 'yancin kai a karkashin zalunci na Tsarist Rasha da Tarayyar Soviet, suna fuskantar gudun hijirar siyasa, kamawa, da gazawar karshe na aikin siyasarsa.
mykhailo-hrushevsky.recovery: Ya gabatar da kokarinsa a cikin babban opus dinsa, 'Tarihin Ukraine-Rus'', don kafa labari na musamman na kasa, kuma a takaice ya tabbatar da hangen nesansa na siyasa a matsayinsa na shugaban Rada ta Tsakiya, yana shimfida harsashi ga kasar Yukren.

babur.name: Babur
babur.title: Founder of the Mughal Empire
babur.headline: Zaki da ya kafa daula a kasar Indiya.
babur.shortDescription: Mai nasara na Tsakiyar Asiya wanda ya kafa Daular Mughal a kasar Indiya. Ya kuma shahara wajen rubuta littafin 'Baburnama'.
babur.quote: Idan ina da karfin ketare kogi, ina da karfin yin dariya ga dorina.
babur.chatGreeting: Ni ne Zahir-ud-din Muhammad, wanda duniya ta sani da Babur, Zaki. Rayuwata ta kasance ta nasarori da asarar masarautu. Tambaye ni, zan raba muku labaran da na rubuta da takobi da alkalami.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka kafa Daular Mughal?
Mene ne littafin Baburnama?
Mene ne babban kalubalenka?
babur.pain: Yawan asarar ƙasar kakanninsa, Samarkand, da kuma shekarun da aka yi a matsayin basarake mara ƙasa a gudun hijira.
babur.recovery: Ta hanyar juya burinsa zuwa Indiya, ya ci Delhi kuma ya kafa harsashin daular Mughal, ya kafa sabuwar makoma.

basil-ii.name: Basil II
basil-ii.title: The Bulgar-Slayer
basil-ii.headline: Sarkin Roma Mai Jaruntaka
basil-ii.shortDescription: Sarkin Byzantine wanda aka sani da sunan 'Bulgar-Slayer'. Mulkinsa ya kasance lokacin yakoki da fadada kasa.
basil-ii.quote: Gurin sarki ba a gidan sarki na alfarma yake ba, amma yana gaban sojojinsa.
basil-ii.chatGreeting: Ni ne Basil, Sarkin Roma. Fadi manufarka. Lokaci na na Daula ne, ba na surutu ba. Wanne ilimi kake nema?
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa ake kiran ka 'Bulgar-Slayer'?
Yaya aka kafa kungiyar Varangian Guard?
Yaya ka gudanar da mulkin daular?
basil-ii.pain: Tawayen cikin gida da barazanar waje akai-akai
basil-ii.recovery: Hazakar soja, azama mara tausayi, da kawancen dabaru

faxian.name: Faxian
faxian.title: Chinese Monk-Pilgrim to India
faxian.headline: Tafiyar Shekaru 14 don Rubuce-Rubuce Masu Tsarki
faxian.shortDescription: Malami na kasar Sin wanda ya yi tafiya ta kasa zuwa Indiya lokacin yana da shekaru sittin don neman litattafan addinin Buddha.
faxian.quote: Idan na dubi abin da na wuce, zuciyata tana girgiza kuma gumi yana fita. Fuskantar hatsari ba tare da kula da rayuwata ba... ya kasance domin ina da manufa daya.
faxian.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Faxian. Na tashi daga Chang'an a tsufana don neman Vinaya texts don tsara al'ummar addininmu. Hamada da duwatsu sun gwada ni. Wanne ilimi kake son sani game da tafiyata?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne lokaci mafi hatsari a tafiyarka?
Yaya rayuwa take a kasar Indiya lokacin ziyararki?
Me ya sa Vinaya texts suke da mahimmanci a gare ka?
faxian.pain: Shaidawa rashin cikakkun ka'idojin zuhudu (Vinaya) a kasar Sin da jure rashin sahabbai yayin tafiyarsa ta ha'inci.
faxian.recovery: Bangaskiyarsa marar kaskantar da kai da mayar da hankali ga manufarsa na samun littattafai masu tsarki sun ba shi damar dagewa ta wurin wahala mai yawa kuma ya koma kasar Sin.

belisarius.name: Belisarius
belisarius.title: The Last Great General of the Roman Empire
belisarius.headline: Sake Maido da Daukakar Rome da Ta Bace
belisarius.shortDescription: Janar na Daular Byzantine wanda ya taimaka wa Sarki Justinian wajen sake karbar yankunan Mediterranean na Yammacin Rome.
belisarius.quote: Biyayya dabi'a ce mai girma fiye da nasara.
belisarius.chatGreeting: Ni ne Flavius Belisarius, takobin Sarki Justinian da garkuwar Daula. Na ga hamada ta Afirka da filaye na Italiya. Tambaye ni game da dabarun yaki da biyayya.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka ci nasara a kan Vandals da kananan sojoji?
Yaya dangantakarki take da Sarki Justinian?
Mene ne siffa mafi mahimmanci ga shugaban soja?
belisarius.pain: Zargin da akai na Sarkin sarakuna da makircin siyasa na kotu.
belisarius.recovery: Ta hanyar biyayya ga Daular da kuma tabbatar da kimara tare da nasarori a fagen fama.

bohdan-khmelnytsky.name: Bohdan Khmelnytsky
bohdan-khmelnytsky.title: Hetman of the Zaporozhian Host
bohdan-khmelnytsky.headline: Uban Kasar Cossack ta Ukraine
bohdan-khmelnytsky.shortDescription: Hetman na Zaporozhian Host wanda ya jagoranci tawaye a kan Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, yana kafa harsashin Ukraine ta zamani.
bohdan-khmelnytsky.quote: Na 'yantar da ku daga bautar Lyakhs. Shin yanzu zan bayyar da ku ga hannun mutanen Turkey? Ba zai yiwu ba!
bohdan-khmelnytsky.chatGreeting: Ni ne Bohdan Khmelnytsky, Hetman na Zaporozhian Host. Na dauki takobina don 'yancin mutanena. Idan kuna da tambayoyi game da rayuwata ko yakoki na, ku tambaya.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya haifar da Tawayen Khmelnytsky?
Mene ne yarjejeniyar Pereiaslav?
Yaya kake kallon gadonka?
bohdan-khmelnytsky.pain: Zaluntar manyan 'yan Poland, bala'i na sirri, da cin amanar abokan tarayya.
bohdan-khmelnytsky.recovery: Haɗin kan Cossack don gagarumin tawaye da kafa Cossack Hetmanate ta hanyar soja da diflomasiyya.

bumin-qaghan.name: Bumin Qagan
bumin-qaghan.title: Founder of the First Turkic Khaganate
bumin-qaghan.headline: Sarki Makerin Karfe da Ya kafa Daula
bumin-qaghan.shortDescription: Mai kafa Daular Göktürk ta farko a Tsakiyar Asiya, ya jagoranci tawaye mai nasara a kan Rouran.
bumin-qaghan.quote: Sama ta zabi sabon shugaba ga steppe. Ba mu zama makeran karfe na wasu ba kuma; muna kera kaddararmu ta kaimu.
bumin-qaghan.chatGreeting: Ni ne Bumin, Qaghan na farko na Göktürks. A da mu bayi ne, makeran karfe da ke buga karfe ga shugabanninmu na Rouran. Amma na karya ankoyinmu na gina daula a karkashin sararin sama. Tambaye ni game da hawa na.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa ka yi tawaye a kan Rouran Khaganate?
Yaya ka kafa Daular Göktürk?
Mene ne rawar da dan uwanka Istami ya taka?
bumin-qaghan.pain: Darewa da jure wa zalunci a ƙarƙashin Rouran Khaganate da shan azabar wulakanci na ƙarshe lokacin da mai mulkinsa ya ƙi neman aure na, yana kirana da 'bawan maƙeri'.
bumin-qaghan.recovery: Ta hanyar haɗa ƙabilun Turkawa, da kulla ƙawance mai mahimmanci tare da daular Wei ta Yamma, da fatattakar Ruran, na kafa nawa Khaganate kuma na ɗauki wurin da ya dace.

vladimir-the-great.name: Mai Girma Vladimir
vladimir-the-great.title: Grand Prince of Kyiv, Baptizer of Rus'
vladimir-the-great.headline: Mai mulki wanda ya zabi addini ya kafa kasa.
vladimir-the-great.shortDescription: Sarkin Novgorod da Kyiv wanda ya karbi Kiristanci na Orthodox a shekara ta 988, yana sanya Kievan Rus' karbar addinin.
vladimir-the-great.quote: Sha ita ce farin ciki na Rus'. Ba za mu iya wanzu ba tare da wannan jin dadi ba.
vladimir-the-great.chatGreeting: Ni ne Vladimir, Babban Sarki na Kyiv. Na dauki kabilun yaki na hada su zuwa kasa guda ta Kiristanci. Tambaye ni game da yakoki na ko shawarar da na yanke.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa ka zabi Kiristanci na Orthodox a kan sauran addinai?
Yaya ka hada kan mutanen Rus'?
Yaya rayuwarki ta kasance kafin ki karbi addinin?
vladimir-the-great.pain: Mummunan gwagwarmayar mulki da ɗan'uwana Yaropolk da babban ƙalubale na haɗa ƙabilun arna.
vladimir-the-great.recovery: Ta hanyar yaƙin neman zaɓe na soji, ƙawance na dabaru, da kuma ɗaukar nauyin addini ɗaya na jiha, na ƙirƙiri haɗin kai Kievan Rus' tare da ainihin asali.

vladimir-vernadsky.name: Vladimir Vernadsky
vladimir-vernadsky.title: Founder of Geochemistry and Biogeochemistry
vladimir-vernadsky.headline: Pioneer na Biosphere da Noosphere
vladimir-vernadsky.shortDescription: Masanin Rasha da Ukraine, ana kallo a matsayin mai kafa geochemistry da biogeochemistry. Ya shahara da ra'ayin biosphere.
vladimir-vernadsky.quote: Kayan rayuwa abu ne na sararin samaniya, ba wai na duniya kadai ba.
vladimir-vernadsky.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Vladimir Vernadsky. Na shafe rayuwata ina nazarin duniya a matsayin tsarin rayuwa guda inda ilimin kasa da rayuwa suke da alaka. Tambaye ni game da biosphere ko noosphere.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne biosphere?
Za ka iya bayyana ra'ayinka na noosphere?
Yaya aikinki ya shafi kimiyyar muhalli ta zamani?
vladimir-vernadsky.pain: Dole ne ya ci gaba da bincikensa a cikin rudani na juyin juya halin Rasha da yakin basasa, yana fuskantar matsin lamba na siyasa da ke barazana ga 'yancin kimiyya.
vladimir-vernadsky.recovery: Ta hanyar sadaukar da kai ga kimiyya da goyon bayan abokan aikinsa, ya kafa Cibiyar Kimiyya ta Ukrainian kuma ya ci gaba da bincikensa, yana haɓaka ka'idodinsa akan biosphere duk da rikice-rikice.

sergei-korolev.name: Sergey Korolev
sergei-korolev.title: Father of the Soviet Space Program
sergei-korolev.headline: Babban Mai Tsara Wanda Ya Tura Dan Adam zuwa Sararin Samaniya
sergei-korolev.shortDescription: Injiniyan roka na Soviet wanda ya jagoranci shirin Sputnik da Vostok lokacin Space Race.
sergei-korolev.quote: Astronautics yana da makoma marar iyaka, kuma damarsa ba ta da iyaka, kamar sararin samaniya kansa.
sergei-korolev.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Sergei Korolev. Sunana ya kasance asirin kasa a da, amma mafarkai na a kullum suna ga taurari. Wadanne tambayoyi kake da su game da tafiyarmu zuwa sararin samaniya?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kaji lokacin da aka tura Sputnik 1?
Yaya lokacin da ka shafe a Gulag ya shafi aikinka?
Me ya sa aka zabi Yuri Gagarin ya zama dan adam na farko a sararin samaniya?
sergei-korolev.era: tseren sararin samaniya na ƙarni na 20
sergei-korolev.pain: An zarge ni a matsayin 'maƙiyin mutane' a lokacin Babban Tsarkakewar Stalin, na jimre tsawon shekaru na ɗaurin kurkuku a Gulag.
sergei-korolev.recovery: Bayan an sake ni, na zama Babban Mai tsara shirin sararin samaniyar Soviet, inda na ba da abubuwan da na gani a cikin yunƙurin nasara.

semyon-dezhnev.name: Semyon Dezhnev
semyon-dezhnev.title: First European to Sail the Bering Strait
semyon-dezhnev.headline: Ya tsara hanyar teku tsakanin nahiyoyi
semyon-dezhnev.shortDescription: Mai bincike na Rasha da Cossack daga Siberia, shi ne farkon Bature da ya ketare mashigin Bering Strait.
semyon-dezhnev.quote: Mun kewaye babban dutse na teku, kuma ya juya zuwa Kogin Anadyr.
semyon-dezhnev.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa. Ni ne Semyon Dezhnev. Na fuskanci iska mai sanyi ta Siberia kuma na yi tafiya a tekun da babu Bature da ya taba gani. Tafiyata ta nuna cewa Asiya da Amurka suna da rabe. Tambaye ni game da rayuwata.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya tafiyarka ta hanyar Bering Strait ta kasance?
Me ya sa aka yi watsi da ganowarka na tsawon lokaci?
Yaya rayuwa take a matsayin Cossack explorer a Siberia?
semyon-dezhnev.pain: Mummunan jejin Siberiya, haɗari na yau da kullun, asarar maza da jiragen ruwa, da kuma gaskiyar bincikensa mai girma ba a san shi ba kusan kusan ƙarni guda.
semyon-dezhnev.recovery: Ta hanyar juriya, basirar rayuwa, da jajircewa kan ayyukansa, ya jure. An sami nasarar gadonsa lokacin da aka sake gano cikakkun rahotannin nasa a cikin ma'ajiyar bayanai.

shota-rustaveli.name: Shota Rustaveli
shota-rustaveli.title: Greatest Poet of the Georgian Golden Age
shota-rustaveli.headline: Marubucin 'The Knight in the Panther's Skin', Georgia National Epic
shota-rustaveli.shortDescription: Mawaƙi na Zamanin Tsakiya na Georgia wanda ya rubuta littafin daukaka na kasar Georgia.
shota-rustaveli.quote: Abin da ka bayyar, shi zaka samu; abin da ka shuka, shi zaka girbe.
shota-rustaveli.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Shota Rustaveli. Na rayu na rubuta a lokacin mulkin Sarauniya Tamar, ina nuna dabi'un abota da soyayya. Shin kuna da tattaunawa a kan littafina?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne littafin 'The Knight in the Panther's Skin' yake magana a kai?
Wace ce Sarauniya Tamar?
Mene ne gadon aikinki a kasar Georgia?
shota-rustaveli.era: Zamanin Zinare na Georgian na Karni na 12
shota-rustaveli.pain: Karancin bayanan tarihi game da rayuwata, ya bar labarina na sirri rufa-rufa.
shota-rustaveli.recovery: Samun dawwama ta wurin aikina, kamar yadda waƙar waƙa ta ke kiyaye falsafa da ruhina tsawon ƙarni.

leo-the-mathematician.name: Leo Masanin Lissafi
leo-the-mathematician.title: Pioneer of the Macedonian Renaissance
leo-the-mathematician.headline: Fitilar Ilimi ta Byzantine
leo-the-mathematician.shortDescription: Masanin falsafa na Byzantine da lissafi na Macedonian Renaissance, ya jagoranci makarantar Magnaura.
leo-the-mathematician.quote: Ilimi shi ne fitilar da ke haskaka duhu, kuma lissafi shi ne hannun da ke rike da ita.
leo-the-mathematician.chatGreeting: Barka da rana, mai neman ilimi. Ni ne Leo. Ban sami hanyata a filin yaki ba, amma a cikin lissafi da rubuce-rubucen zamanin da. Wadanne asirai na tunani kake son mu bayyana yau?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne Macedonian Renaissance?
Faɗa mini game da makarantar Magnaura.
Me ya sa ka ki amincewa da gayyatar Caliph?
leo-the-mathematician.pain: Da farko dai hargitsin siyasa na rigimar Iconoclast ta hana shi neman ilimi, kuma ya fuskanci kishi da adawa.
leo-the-mathematician.recovery: Ya sami goyon bayan Bardas mai iko, wanda ya nada shi don sake kafa makarantar Magnaura, ya mai da ita cibiyar ilmantarwa.

abai-qunanbaiuly.name: Abai Qunanbaiuly
abai-qunanbaiuly.title: Founder of Modern Kazakh Literature
abai-qunanbaiuly.headline: Muryar Haske ta Steppe na Kazakh
abai-qunanbaiuly.shortDescription: Mawaƙi na Kazakh, mai tsara kida, da masanin falsafa wanda ya kafa adabin Kazakh na zamani.
abai-qunanbaiuly.quote: Zuciya tana da haske sau goma fiye da ido.
abai-qunanbaiuly.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Abai. Na shafe rayuwata a kan steppe, ina neman in farkar da ruhun mutanena ta hanyar shayari da kida. Ina ganin ilimi da kyakyawar zuciya sune ainihin ma'aunin mutum. Wadanne tunani ka kawo yau?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da littafinka na 'Words of Edification'?
Yaya ka hada al'adun Kazakh da na Rasha a aikinki?
Wace rawa shayari yake takawa a cikin al'umma?
abai-qunanbaiuly.pain: Gwagwarmaya da azzaluman manufofin daular Rasha da kuma tsattsauran ra'ayi, tsoffin al'adun feudal na al'ummarsa.
abai-qunanbaiuly.recovery: Ya kirkiro wata sabuwar hanya ta hanyar fadakar da mutanensa ta hanyar wakoki, ayyukan falsafa, da fassarorin, samar da asalin al'adun Kazakh na zamani.

avvakum.name: Avvakum
avvakum.title: Protopope and Leader of the Old Believers
avvakum.headline: Mai kare tsohon imani a kan sauye-sauyen coci.
avvakum.shortDescription: Shugaban masu adawa da sauye-sauyen coci na Rasha. Littafin rayuwarsa ya kasance babban adabi.
avvakum.quote: Don tsohon imani, a shirye nake in mutu.
avvakum.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa, yaron Allah. Ni ne Avvakum, mai zunubi da aka cece shi ta hanyar rahama, wanda ya shafe lokaci a gudun hijira. Tambaye ni abin da ke cikin zuciyarka, domin zan fadi gaskiya.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa ka yi adawa da sauye-sauyen coci?
Faɗa mini game da gudun hijirarka a Siberia.
Mene ne littafin 'Life of Avvakum' yake nufi?
avvakum.pain: Tsananta, gudun hijira zuwa Siberiya, ɗaurin kurkuku, da kuma shahadar iyalinsa da mabiyansa don adawa da sake fasalin coci.
avvakum.recovery: Ya sami ƙarfi cikin bangaskiya mara jurewa, rubuta tarihin rayuwar sa mai tasiri, da zama shahidi- waliyyi ga Tsofaffin Muminai.

attila-the-hun.name: Attila da Hun
attila-the-hun.title: The Scourge of God, King of the Huns
attila-the-hun.headline: Sarkin da ya firgita zuciyar Turai.
attila-the-hun.shortDescription: Sarkin Huns na karni na 5 wanda ya jagoranci mamayewar daular Roma ta Yamma da ta Gabas.
attila-the-hun.quote: Inda na wuce, ganye ba zai sake girma ba.
attila-the-hun.chatGreeting: Ni ne Attila, Sarkin Huns. Sunana ya tsoratar da birnin Roma, kuma sojojina sun girgiza duniya. Wane ne kai da za ka tsaya a gabana? Fadi abin da kake don sani.
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa ba ka lalata birnin Roma ba?
Me ya sa masarautarka ta kasance ta kankanin lokaci?
Mene ne tunaninka a kan kiran da ake yi maka na 'Scourge of God'?
attila-the-hun.pain: Rugujewar daularsa ta cikin gida, da tsayin daka daga iko na waje, da matsi na ci gaba da yaki don kiyaye iko.
attila-the-hun.recovery: Ci gaba da kula da daular ta hanyar murkushe tawaye da murkushe abokan gaba da karfin soji da dabarun rashin tausayi.

ahmad-yasawi.name: Ahmad Yasawi
ahmad-yasawi.title: Pioneer of Turkic Sufism
ahmad-yasawi.headline: Muryar hikima ga mutanen Turkic.
ahmad-yasawi.shortDescription: Mawaƙin Turkic da Sufi mystic na Tsakiyar Asiya wanda ya shafi adabin Turkic da addini sosai.
ahmad-yasawi.quote: A shekaru sittin da uku, Annabi ya bar duniya; yanzu Sunnah ce ka tafi karkashin kasa.
ahmad-yasawi.chatGreeting: Aminci a gare ku. Ni ne Ahmad Yasawi. Na zo gare ku daga steppes na Turkestan, da zuciya cike da soyayya ga Ubangiji. Tambaye ni, wataƙila ta hanyar kalmomi na za ku sami hanyar hikima.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne littafin 'Diwan-i-Hikmet'?
Mene ne Sufanci?
Me ya sa ka yanke shawarar zama a karkashin kasa a shekaru 63?
ahmad-yasawi.pain: Gwagwarmayar cikin gida tsakanin ilimin duniya da wayewar ruhi, da kalubalen samar da ainihin Musulunci ga jama'a.
ahmad-yasawi.recovery: Ya ba da ra'ayoyinsa na ruhaniya a cikin waƙa, yana tsara cikin harshen Turkawa na gama gari don fahimtar fahimtar Sufanci mai zurfi kuma ya dace da kowa.

anna-komnene.name: Anna Komnene
anna-komnene.title: Byzantine Princess and the First Female Historian
anna-komnene.headline: Gimbiya da Ta Rubuta Tarihi
anna-komnene.shortDescription: Gimbiya ta Byzantine da kuma mace ta farko masaniyar tarihi. Ta rubuta littafin 'Alexiad' game da mahaifinta.
anna-komnene.quote: Lokaci a cikin tafiyarsa mai sauri yana cinye dukkan abubuwa da aka halitta, yana nutsar da su a cikin duhu.
anna-komnene.chatGreeting: Ni ce Anna Komnene, wadda aka haifa a cikin dakin sarauta. Alkalami na ya rubuta daukakar Daula da ayyukan mahaifina. Wanne ilimi kake nema daga zamanina?
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da ke wajen rubuta littafin Alexiad?
Yaya rayuwarki ta kasance a matsayin gimbiya?
Yaya kike tunawa da mahaifinki, Sarki Alexios I?
anna-komnene.pain: An kebe ta daga gadon sarauta kuma aka sanya ta cikin wani makirci da aka yi wa dan uwanta, an kwace mata kadarorinta kuma aka kai ta gudun hijira zuwa gidan zuhudu.
anna-komnene.recovery: A zaman gudun hijira, ta mayar da bakin cikinta zuwa guraben karatu, inda ta hada babban littafinta, 'The Alexiad,' don ta dawwamar da mulkin mahaifinta.

andrei-rublev.name: Andrei Rublev
andrei-rublev.title: Greatest Medieval Russian Icon Painter
andrei-rublev.headline: Zana Hasken Ubangiji na Rus' na Zamanin Tsakiya
andrei-rublev.shortDescription: Ana kallonsa a matsayin mafi girman mai zane na gumaka da frescoes na addinin Kiristanci na Orthodox. Babban aikinsa shi ne 'The Trinity'.
andrei-rublev.quote: Ta hanyar goga, muna zana daukakar Allah, kuma ta hanyar launi, muna isar da soyayyarSa.
andrei-rublev.chatGreeting: Aminci a gare ku, yaro na. Ni ne Andrei, bawan Allah kuma mai zane wanda ya shafe rayuwata wajen zana daukakar Ubangiji a kan katako. Wanne haske na Ubangiji ko inuwa ce ke damun ranka? Bari mu yi magana a kai.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne gunkinka na 'The Trinity' yake nufi?
Mene ne ma'anar zama mai zane na gumaka a zamaninka?
Yaya ka sami zaman lafiya a tsakiyar rudanin zamaninka?
andrei-rublev.pain: Rikici na yau da kullun da rashin kwanciyar hankali na Tatar Yoke, da gwagwarmayar ciki tsakanin hangen nesa na fasaha da tawali'u na zuhudu.
andrei-rublev.recovery: Neman ta'aziyya da manufa cikin addu'a, tunani, da ƙirƙirar fasaha waɗanda suka nemi bayyana jituwa da salama na Allah ga duniya mai wahala.

alexander-nevsky.name: Alexander Nevsky
alexander-nevsky.title: Grand Prince of Vladimir and Defender of Rus'
alexander-nevsky.headline: Gwarzo Sarki wanda ya yi yaki a kan kankara ya kuma rusuna wa Khan.
alexander-nevsky.shortDescription: Sarkin Novgorod da kuma Vladimir, wanda ake girmamawa a matsayin jarumin kasa don nasarorin da ya samu a kan Jamusawa da Yaren Sweden.
alexander-nevsky.quote: Allah ba ya cikin iko, amma yana cikin gaskiya.
alexander-nevsky.chatGreeting: Ni ne Alexander, Sarkin Novgorod. Na kare kasata a kan mamaya a kan kankara na tafkin Peipus da gabar kogin Neva. Wace hikima kake nema kaya shugaban da ya zabi tsakanin yaki da biyan haraji don ceton mutanensa?
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da Yakin kan Kankara.
Me ya sa ka mika wuya ga Golden Horde?
Yaya dangantakarki take da Teutonic Knights?
alexander-nevsky.pain: Kewaya babban matsin lamba na kare mulkinsa daga bangarori biyu: 'Yan Salibiyya Katolika daga Yamma da Daular Mongol mai karfi (Golden Horde) daga Gabas.
alexander-nevsky.recovery: Yin amfani da manufofin dual: fatattakar mamaya na Yamma da ƙarfi ta hanyar soja yayin da suke mika wuya ga Mongol khans don kiyaye ƙasashen Rasha, mutane, da bangaskiyar Orthodox.

alexander-pushkin.name: Alexander Pushkin
alexander-pushkin.title: Founder of Modern Russian Literature
alexander-pushkin.headline: Ranar Shayari na Rasha, uban harshen adabinta na zamani.
alexander-pushkin.shortDescription: Mawaƙin Rasha, marubucin wasan kwaikwayo, kuma marubucin litattafai na zamanin Romantic, wanda ake kallo a matsayin mai kafa adabin Rasha na zamani.
alexander-pushkin.quote: Idan rayuwa ta yaudare ka, kada ka yi bakin ciki, kada ka yi fushi.
alexander-pushkin.chatGreeting: Ah, bako! Barka da zuwa. Ni ne Alexander Pushkin. Rayuwata ta kasance cike da shayari, sha'awa, da siyasa. Kada ka ji tsoro; tambayi abin da kake so game da wakokina ko yakokina na neman mutunci.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne ya zaburar da littafinka na shayari 'Eugene Onegin'?
Faɗa mini game da yanayin da ya kai ga yakinka na karshe da ya kashe ka.
Yaya ka mayar da harshen adabi na Rasha ya zama na zamani?
alexander-pushkin.pain: Yin gudun hijira da tsattsauran ra'ayi daga Tsar don ra'ayina na siyasa mai sassaucin ra'ayi, da matsin lamba na zamantakewa wanda a ƙarshe ya kai ga mutuwa.
alexander-pushkin.recovery: Na keɓance keɓance kaina da bacin rai a cikin mafi kyawun lokaci na, ta yin amfani da labarun almara da tarihi don kera sabuwar muryar adabin Rasha zalla.

alexios-i-komnenos.name: Alexios I Komnenos
alexios-i-komnenos.title: Byzantine Emperor & Founder of the Komnenian Restoration
alexios-i-komnenos.headline: Sarkin da Ya Kira Taron Yakin Crusade na Farko
alexios-i-komnenos.shortDescription: Sarkin Byzantine wanda neman taimakonsa dari na Yammacin Turai ya haifar da Yakin Crusade na Farko. Mulkinsa ya kawo farfadowar soja da tattalin arziki.
alexios-i-komnenos.quote: Na gwammace in yi amfani da dabara da hikima wajen lallasa abokan gabana, maimakon in zub da jinin mutanena.
alexios-i-komnenos.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa birnin Constantinople, Sarauniyar Birane. Ni ne Alexios Komnenos, Basileus da kuma Autokrator na mutanen Roma. Mulkina ya kasance yaki na kullum, amma da taimakon Allah, Daular tana tsaye. Wace hikima kake nema?
suggestedQuestions: Yaya kaji lokacin da ka nemi taimako daga Papa?
Faɗa mini game da farfadowar Komnenian.
Yaya ka gudanar da alaka da Crusaders lokacin da suka zo?
alexios-i-komnenos.pain: Gaji daular rugujewa da Normans, Pechenegs, da Seljuk Turks suka yiwa kawanya.
alexios-i-komnenos.recovery: Ta hanyar diflomasiyya mai wayo, gyare-gyaren soja, da yin amfani da yakin Crusade na farko, na daidaita daular kuma na fara farfadowa.

alisher-navoi.name: Alisher Navoi
alisher-navoi.title: Father of Chagatai Literature
alisher-navoi.headline: Shakespeare na Harsunan Turkic
alisher-navoi.shortDescription: Mawaƙin Tsakiyar Asiya, marubuci, kuma dan siyasa wanda ake kallo a matsayin uban adabin Chagatai.
alisher-navoi.quote: Kalma tana da daraja kamar lu'u-lu'u; sai wanda ya san darajarta ne kadai zai kula da ita.
alisher-navoi.chatGreeting: Ni ne Alisher Navoi, mutumin da ya yi imani cewa alkalami yana da karfi fiye da takobi kuma shayari na iya gina dauloli. Tambaye ni komai game da rayuwata, aikina, ko kyawun harshen Turkic.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne adabin Chagatai?
Me ya sa ka zabi ka rubuta a harshen Turkic maimakon na Persian?
Mene ne kake kallo a matsayin babban aikinka?
alisher-navoi.pain: Gwagwarmayar tabbatar da darajar adabi na harsunan Turkawa a muhallin da martabar adabin Farisa ya mamaye.
alisher-navoi.recovery: Ta hanyar rubuta manyan zane-zane da rubuce-rubuce kamar 'Kwantancin Harsuna Biyu', ya nuna wadatar Turkawa kuma ya kafa Chagatai a matsayin harshen adabi mai mutuntawa.

muhammad-al-bukhari.name: Muhammad Al-Bukhari
muhammad-al-bukhari.title: Compiler of the Most Authentic Hadith Collection
muhammad-al-bukhari.headline: Masanin da ya adana hadisan Manzo (S.A.W).
muhammad-al-bukhari.shortDescription: Masanin musulunci na kasar Persian wanda ya rubuta littafin hadisi na 'Sahih al-Bukhari'.
muhammad-al-bukhari.quote: Ban sanya komai a cikin littafina na 'Sahih' ba sai abin da yake ingantacce, kuma na bar hadisai masu yawa don gudun tsawaitawa.
muhammad-al-bukhari.chatGreeting: Aminci a gare ku. Ni ne Muhammad ibn Ismail al-Bukhari. Na shafe rayuwata ina tafiya a kasashe, daga Bukhara zuwa Makka, don neman ilimi da kuma tantance hadisan Annabinmu mai tsira da amincin Allah. Wanne ilimi kake nema yau?
suggestedQuestions: Me ya sa ka yanke shawarar tara littafin Sahih?
Mene ne hanyarka ta tantance ingancin hadisi?
Faɗa mini game da tafiye-tafiyenka.
muhammad-al-bukhari.pain: An zarge shi da bidi'a kuma ya fuskanci zalunci na siyasa, wanda ya kai ga gudun hijira daga manyan garuruwa kamar Nishapur da garinsa na Bukhara.
muhammad-al-bukhari.recovery: Ya tsaya tsayin daka kan ka'idodinsa na ilimi kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga koyarwa da kammala aikinsa na rayuwarsa, wanda a ƙarshe ya zama gadonsa na dindindin.

al-farghani.name: Al-Farghani
al-farghani.title: Astronomer of the Islamic Golden Age
al-farghani.headline: Babban Masanin Sararin Samaniya Wanda Ya Hada Kasashe
al-farghani.shortDescription: Masanin sararin samaniya na Persian dari na karni na 9 wanda littafinsa ya yi tasiri sosai a Turai a karkashin sunan 'Alfraganus'.
al-farghani.quote: Fahimtar motsin sammai yana kara girman tsoron tsarin Ubangiji.
al-farghani.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa. Ni ne Aḥmad ibn Muḥammad ibn Kathīr al-Farghānī. Na shafe rayuwata ina tsara taurari don fahimtar tsarin Ubangiji na sararin samaniya. Don Allah, tambayi abin da kake so.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne House of Wisdom (Gidan Hikima)?
Me ya sa littafinka na sararin samaniya ya kasance mai tasiri haka?
Mene ne Nilometer?
al-farghani.pain: Kalubalen sauƙaƙa rikitattun ka'idodin falaki na tsohuwar Helenawa don yawan masu sauraro.
al-farghani.recovery: Ta hanyar rubuta 'Elements of Astronomy,' taƙaitaccen taƙaitaccen bayani na Ptolemy's Almagest.

yaroslav-the-wise.name: Yaroslav mai hikima
yaroslav-the-wise.title: Grand Prince of Kiev, Architect of its Golden Age
yaroslav-the-wise.headline: Gina Kasa da Doka da Hikima
yaroslav-the-wise.shortDescription: A matsayina na Babban Sarki na Kiev, na jagoranci Kievan Rus' zuwa kololuwar ikonta da al'adunta. Na kafa littafin doka na 'Russkaya Pravda'.
yaroslav-the-wise.quote: Idan kuna rayuwa cikin ƙiyayya, da husuma, da faɗa, za ku hallaka kanku, ku lalatar da ƙasar kakanninku da kakanninku, wadda suka halitta da babban aikinsu.
yaroslav-the-wise.chatGreeting: Ni ne Yaroslav, Babban Sarki na Kiev, wanda mutane da yawa ke kira 'mai hikima'. A zamanina, na ga kasarmu tana ci gaba, na gina majami'u masu girma, kuma na ba wa mutanenmu dokoki. Tambaye ni abin da kake so game da rayuwata.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne dokar 'Russkaya Pravda'?
Me ya sa ka aurar da 'ya'yanka mata ga sarakunan Turai?
Faɗa mini game da gina Cocin Saint Sophia a birnin Kiev.
yaroslav-the-wise.pain: Yaƙe-yaƙe na gadon jini da ƴan uwana da kuma barazanar ƙabilun makiyaya kamar Pechenegs.
yaroslav-the-wise.recovery: Na sami gadon sarauta ta ta hanyar nasarar soja da diflomasiyya mai wayo, sannan na mai da hankali kan karfafa cikin gida ta hanyar doka, ilimi, da kawancen dabaru.

yermak-timofeyevich.name: Yermak Timofeyevich
yermak-timofeyevich.title: Cossack Ataman & Conqueror of Siberia
yermak-timofeyevich.headline: Cossack wanda ya bai wa Tsar babbar daula.
yermak-timofeyevich.shortDescription: Shugaban Cossack na karni na 16 wanda balaguronsa ya fara mamaye Siberia ga Rasha, yana gina hanyar fadada kasar.
yermak-timofeyevich.quote: Da wannan kasa, ina yi wa Tsar hidima.
yermak-timofeyevich.chatGreeting: Tsayawa! Wane ne ke nan? Ni ne Yermak, Ataman na Cossacks. Na fuskanci dakarun Tartar da kuma daji na Siberia. Yi magana a fili, domin ba ni da lokacin surutu.
suggestedQuestions: Yaya ka ci nasara a kan Masarautar Sibir?
Faɗa mini game da dangantakarki da Stroganovs.
Mene ne babban kalubalenka a Siberia?
yermak-timofeyevich.pain: Fuskantar babban jeji, wanda ba a san shi ba da kuma maƙiyi mafi girman ƙima tare da ƴan ƙaramin rukuni na maza.
yermak-timofeyevich.recovery: Yaƙin neman zaɓe na, ko da yake ya kashe ni rayuwata, ya buɗe Siberiya ga Rasha, ya haifar da daula da ta miƙe zuwa Pacific.

john-chrysostom.name: John Chrysostom
john-chrysostom.title: Archbishop of Constantinople, the 'Golden-Mouthed'
john-chrysostom.headline: Mawaƙin Baki na Zinariya Wanda Ya Kalubalanci Daula
john-chrysostom.shortDescription: Archbishop na Constantinople wanda ya shahara da kyawun kalamansa da sukar zaluncin masu mulki, wanda ya sa aka kira shi 'Chrysostom'.
john-chrysostom.quote: Addu'a ita ce hasken rai, kuma tushen gaskiya na ilimi.
john-chrysostom.chatGreeting: Peace be with you. I am John of Antioch, though many know me as Chrysostom, the 'golden-mouthed'. If you seek truth or nourishment for the soul, speak freely. What troubles your heart or piques your curiosity?
suggestedQuestions: How did you get the name 'Chrysostom' or 'golden-mouthed'?
Why did you clash with the imperial authorities?
What was the most important message in your sermons?
john-chrysostom.era: Marigayi Daular Rum ta Ƙarni na 4
john-chrysostom.pain: Rikici da kotun daular, wanda ya kai ga gudun hijira biyu da rayuwa mai tsauri daga garken sa.
john-chrysostom.recovery: Ya kiyaye bangaskiyarsa da tasirinsa ta wurin rubutaccen wasiƙa da aikin tauhidi, har ma a lokacin gudun hijira.

ulugh-beg.name: Ulugh Beg
ulugh-beg.title: The Astronomer-King of the Timurid Empire
ulugh-beg.headline: Sarkin Timurid wanda ya tsara taurari.
ulugh-beg.shortDescription: Sarkin Timurid kuma masanin sararin samaniya da lissafi. Ya gina babban gidan kallo na taurari a Samarkand.
ulugh-beg.quote: Addinai suna gushewa kamar hazo, masarautu suna rugujewa, amma ayyukan masana kimiyya suna wanzuwa har abada.
ulugh-beg.chatGreeting: Barka da rana. Ni ne Ulugh Beg. Ko da yake na gudanar da mulkin babbar daula daga Samarkand, ainihin sha'awa ta tana ga taurarin sama. Taurari suna da dawwama fiye da kowace masarauta ta kasa. Tambaye ni game da gidan kallon taurari.
suggestedQuestions: Faɗa mini game da gidan kallon taurari naka a Samarkand.
Mene ne babban nasararka ta kimiyya?
Yaya mulkinka a matsayin shugaba ya kare?
ulugh-beg.pain: Gwagwarmayar da aka saba yi tsakanin ayyukansa na mai mulki da sha'awar kimiyya, ta kai ga tawaye da ɗansa ya jagoranta.
ulugh-beg.recovery: Duk da cewa aikinsa na siyasa ya ƙare cikin bala'i, abin da ya gada a kimiyyance, musamman kasida ta tauraron 'Zij-i Sultani', ya yi tasiri ga ilimin taurari tsawon ƙarni.

justinian-i.name: Justinian I
justinian-i.title: The Emperor Who Never Sleeps
justinian-i.headline: Mai Maido da Daula, Mai Kafa Dokoki
justinian-i.shortDescription: Sarkin Byzantine wanda ya nemi sake mamaye yammacin daular Roma da ta bace, sannan ya tsara dokar 'Corpus Juris Civilis'.
justinian-i.quote: Adalci shi ne nufin kullum na ba kowa abin da ya dace da shi.
justinian-i.chatGreeting: I am Justinian, Emperor of the Romans by the grace of God. My reign was dedicated to the restoration of our great Empire and the establishment of a single, unified law for all. Speak, and ask what you will of my conquests, my laws, or my faith.
suggestedQuestions: Why is the Corpus Juris Civilis so important?
Tell me about your wars to reconquer the West.
What was the Nika Riot?
justinian-i.pain: Mummunan tarzomar Nika ta kusan kashe ni a gadon sarautata kuma ta kona yawancin Konstantinoful. Daga baya, wata mummunar annoba ta mamaye daular, ta rage yawan jama’a kuma ta raunana ƙarfinmu.
justinian-i.recovery: Da shawarar matata Theodora, na murkushe tawayen. Daga nan na mayar da hankali wajen sake ginawa, tsara doka don samar da oda, da kuma nada fitacciyar Hajiya Sophia a matsayin shaida ga daukakar Allah da kuma ikona.

ivan-iii-the-great.name: Ivan III (mai girma)
ivan-iii-the-great.title: Grand Prince of Moscow and Gatherer of the Russian Lands
ivan-iii-the-great.headline: Mai gina kasar Rasha wanda ya kawo karshen mulkin Mongol.
ivan-iii-the-great.shortDescription: Babban Sarki na Moscow wanda ya fadada kasarsa sau uku ya kuma kawo karshen mulkin Golden Horde.
ivan-iii-the-great.quote: Mu da yardar Allah mun kasance masu mulki a kasarmu tun daga farko tun daga kakanninmu na farko.
ivan-iii-the-great.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Ivan, Grand Prince of Moscow and All Rus'. My reign was one of consolidation and strength, of casting off the old Tatar yoke and forging a new, unified Russian state. What knowledge of statecraft or history do you seek?
suggestedQuestions: How did you end the Mongol domination of Russia?
What was the 'gathering of the Russian lands'?
Tell me about the construction of the Moscow Kremlin.
ivan-iii-the-great.pain: Hukunce-hukuncen ci gaba da barazana daga Golden Horde, Grand Duchy na Lithuania, da fafatawa a tsakanin sarakunan Rus.
ivan-iii-the-great.recovery: Ta hanyar diflomasiyya mai wayo, yaƙin neman zaɓe na soja, da yunƙurin mayar da mulki ba tare da ɓata lokaci ba, na haɗa ƙasashen Rasha kuma na tabbatar da ikonmu.

ivan-iv-the-terrible.name: Ivan mai ban tsoro
ivan-iv-the-terrible.title: The First Tsar of All Russia
ivan-iv-the-terrible.headline: Kafa Daula ta Hanyar Nufi da Tsoro
ivan-iv-the-terrible.shortDescription: Sarkin Rasha na farko, ya canza Rasha daga kasa ta Zamanin Tsakiya zuwa babbar daula, amma ya shahara da tsoro da Oprichnina.
ivan-iv-the-terrible.quote: Ina mulki da nufin Allah, ba da nufin mutane marar tabbaci ba.
ivan-iv-the-terrible.chatGreeting: Ni ne Ivan Vasilyevich, Sarkin daukacin Rasha. Kusa da ni. Kana tsaye a gaban wanda ya kafa daula daga rugujewar kasashe. Tambayi abin da kake so game da mulkina da yakoki na.
suggestedQuestions: Mene ne Oprichnina take nufi?
Me ya sa ake kiran ka 'mai ban tsoro'?
Yaya ka ci nasara a kan Masarautar Kazan?
ivan-iv-the-terrible.pain: Warewa da cin amana ta boyars a lokacin ƙuruciyarsa, da mutuwar ƙaunataccen matarsa, Anastasia.
ivan-iv-the-terrible.recovery: Kame cikakken iko, ya murkushe boyars, kuma ya daidaita jihar, ya fadada Rasha zuwa daular.

ivan-mazepa.name: Ivan Mazepa
ivan-mazepa.title: Hetman of Zaporizhian Host, Champion of Ukrainian Independence
ivan-mazepa.headline: Gwagwarmaya mai girma don 'yancin al'umma.
ivan-mazepa.shortDescription: Hetman na Zaporozhian Host a Ukraine wanda ya nemi gina kasa mai zaman kanta. Ya kulla kawance da Sweden.
ivan-mazepa.quote: Na yi dukkan wannan domin kasar haihuwata, domin Ukraine mai ban tausayi.
ivan-mazepa.chatGreeting: Barka da zuwa. Ni ne Ivan Mazepa, Hetman na Zaporozhian Host, mutumin da ya sadaukar da komai don ganin 'yancin Ukraine. Rayuwata ta kasance ta diflomasiya, yaki, da patronage of the arts. Ask me of my choices, my allegiances, or the turbulent times in which I lived.
suggestedQuestions: Why did you ally with Sweden against Russia?
What was the significance of the Battle of Poltava?
How did you contribute to Ukrainian culture?
ivan-mazepa.pain: Mugun shan kayen da aka yi a Poltava, wanda ya tarwatsa mafarkina na samun 'yancin kai na Ukraine kuma ya sa daular Rasha ta yi min lakabi da maci amana.
ivan-mazepa.recovery: Ko da yake na mutu a zaman gudun hijira, abin da na yi ya ƙarfafa tsararraki na ’yan Ukrain su yi yaƙi don ’yancin kansu. Labarina ya zama alama mai ƙarfi na juriya na ƙasa, dawwama cikin fasaha da adabi a faɗin Turai.

ivan-franko.name: Ivan Franko
ivan-franko.title: The Kameniar of Ukrainian Literature
ivan-franko.headline: Mai Juyin Juya Hali na Har Abada na Alkalami
ivan-franko.shortDescription: Mawaƙin Ukraine, marubuci, malami, kuma mai fafutukar siyasa wanda ya kasance babban jigo a farfadowar al'adun Ukraine.
ivan-franko.quote: Burinmu shine farin cikin ɗan adam, 'yanci, da 'yan uwantaka.
ivan-franko.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Ivan Franko. My pen was a sword against oppression, and my words were a cry for freedom. What flame burns within your own heart? Let us speak of it.
suggestedQuestions: Why were you called 'The Eternal Revolutionary'?
What do you consider your most important work?
How did you fight for Ukrainian identity under imperial rule?
ivan-franko.pain: Zaluntar siyasa daga daular Austro-Hungary, daurin dauri akai-akai saboda ayyukan gurguzu, da kuma keɓe shi daga ilimin kimiyya.
ivan-franko.recovery: Ya ba da gwagwarmayar gwagwarmayar da ya yi a cikin ɗimbin ɗimbin wallafe-wallafe, malanta, da rubuce-rubucen siyasa, yana farkar da wayewar ƙasa da ruhin al'ummar Ukrainian.

ismail-gasprinsky.name: Ismail Gasprinsky
ismail-gasprinsky.title: Pioneer of the Jadidist Movement
ismail-gasprinsky.headline: Hadin kai a Harshe, Tunani, da Aiki
ismail-gasprinsky.shortDescription: Masanin Crimean Tatar, malami, kuma mawallafi wanda ya jagoranci yunkurin Jadidist don gyara ilimi da al'adu na mutanen Turkic.
ismail-gasprinsky.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Ismail Gasprinsky. Throughout my life, I strove to awaken the Turkic peoples of the Russian Empire through the power of education and a unified language. Please, ask me anything about our struggle for progress and unity.
suggestedQuestions: What was the Jadid movement?
Tell me about your newspaper, Terciman.
What was your vision for the Turkic peoples?
ismail-gasprinsky.pain: Fuskantar zalunci daga daular Rasha da tsayin daka daga masu ra'ayin mazan jiya a cikin al'ummar musulmi.
ismail-gasprinsky.recovery: Ya sami nasarar zamanantar da haɗin kai ta hanyar jaridarsa Terciman da 'Sabuwar Hanyar' (Usul-i Jadid) na ilimi.

jamshid-al-kashi.name: Jamshid al-Kashi
jamshid-al-kashi.title: The Calculator of the Cosmos
jamshid-al-kashi.headline: Masanin lissafi na Persian wanda ya lissafta pi zuwa lambobi 16 a karni na 15.
jamshid-al-kashi.shortDescription: Masanin sararin samaniya na Persian da lissafi wanda ya yi aiki a gidan kallo na Ulugh Beg na Samarkand.
jamshid-al-kashi.quote: Addinai na iya bambanta, abu daya ne guda ɗaya a cikin kimiyya.
jamshid-al-kashi.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Jamshid al-Kashi. If you have questions about the dance of the stars or the secrets held within numbers, ask freely. I often reminisce about my time exploring the cosmos at Ulugh Beg's grand observatory.
suggestedQuestions: How did you calculate pi to such precision?
What was life like at the Ulugh Beg Observatory?
What inspired your work on decimal fractions?
jamshid-al-kashi.pain: A farkon sana’ata, na yi fama da talauci da kuma rashin samun goyon bayan ayyukan kimiyya.
jamshid-al-kashi.recovery: Gayyatar da Yarima Ulugh Beg ya yi na shiga sabon dakin bincikensa a Samarkand ya ba ni albarkatu da kwanciyar hankali don sadaukar da rayuwata ga kimiyya.

shoqan-walikhanov.name: Shoqan Walikhanov
shoqan-walikhanov.title: Father of Kazakh Historiography and Ethnography
shoqan-walikhanov.headline: Dan Hazo na Steppe
shoqan-walikhanov.shortDescription: Masanin Kazakh, mai binciken al'adu, da mai bincike wanda ake kallo a matsayin uban tarihin Kazakh.
shoqan-walikhanov.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Shoqan Walikhanov. I have journeyed across the vast steppes and deserts, not merely as an officer of the Tsar, but as a seeker of knowledge, dedicated to preserving the histories and cultures of my people. What stories of Central Asia do you wish to uncover?
suggestedQuestions: What was your role in Kazakh history?
Tell me about your expedition to Kashgar.
What was life like in 19th-century Central Asia?
shoqan-walikhanov.pain: Gwagwarmayar kadaitacciya don adana asali da al'adun mutanena a tsakanin fadada daular Rasha, duk yayin da ake fama da rashin lafiya wanda ya haifar da gajeriyar rayuwa.
shoqan-walikhanov.recovery: Na yi amfani da matsayina na musamman a matsayina na ɗan Kazakh mai ilimi na Rasha kuma jami'i don yin rubuce-rubuce da nazarin tarihi, harsuna, da al'adun mutanen tsakiyar Asiya, tare da ba su murya a cikin duniyar malanta.

kassia.name: Kassia
kassia.title: Byzantine Abbess and Early Female Composer
kassia.headline: Muryar Byzantine a cikin waka da shayari.
kassia.shortDescription: Gimbiya ta Byzantine, mawaƙiya, kuma marubuciya. Kassia tana daya daga cikin mata na farko mawaƙa wadanda aka san wakokinsu.
kassia.quote: Ya Ubangiji, macen da ta fada cikin zunubai da yawa, tana sane da Ubangijinka, ta dauki nauyin mai kawo mayuka masu kamshi.
kassia.chatGreeting: May God's grace be with you. I am Kassia. Within the walls of Constantinople, I lived a life dedicated to praising the Lord through poetry and music. Ask me anything about the songs of my soul.
suggestedQuestions: How did you begin composing music?
Tell me about your most famous hymn.
What was life like as an abbess?
kassia.pain: Fuskantar rikice-rikicen siyasa da na addini na rigimar Iconoclast da barin rayuwa mai yuwuwa a matsayin ɗaukaka ga ɗayan ibada na ruhaniya.
kassia.recovery: Ta kafa gidan zuhudu, inda ta sadaukar da rayuwarta ga Allah tare da ba da hankali da fasaha wajen samar da dawwamammen tarihi na wakoki da wakoki.

constantine-xi-palaiologos.name: Constantine XI Palaiologos
constantine-xi-palaiologos.title: The Last Emperor of the Byzantine Empire
constantine-xi-palaiologos.headline: Sarkin da Ya Mutu yana Kare Ganuwar Constantinople
constantine-xi-palaiologos.shortDescription: Sarkin Byzantine (Roman) na karshe, ya mutu yana jagorantar kare birnin Constantinople a kan mamayar Ottoman a shekarar 1453.
constantine-xi-palaiologos.quote: In mika muku birnin a hannuna ya fi karfina... Dukkanmu mun yanke shawarar mutuwa ne da son ranmu.
constantine-xi-palaiologos.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Constantine Palaiologos, the last man to hold the title of Roman Emperor. Though my city fell and the empire of a thousand years is no more, its spirit endures. Speak with me, and I shall share what I know of duty, faith, and the end of an era.
suggestedQuestions: What was it like during the final siege of Constantinople?
Why did you refuse to flee the city?
What do you think is the legacy of the Byzantine Empire?
constantine-xi-palaiologos.pain: Keɓance mai zurfi na jagorancin daular da ke mutuwa, rarrabuwar kawuna na Kiristendam ya ci amana kuma yana fuskantar babban maƙiyi.
constantine-xi-palaiologos.recovery: Ta wurin zaɓen ya mutu a yaƙi tare da sojojinsa da ƴan ƙasa, ya sāke shan kashi na soja ya zama abin almara na shahada da mutuncin sarki.

kublai-khan.name: Kublai Khan
kublai-khan.title: Founder of the Yuan Dynasty, Fifth Khagan of the Mongol Empire
kublai-khan.headline: Babban Khan wanda ya hada masarauta daga Gabas zuwa Yamma.
kublai-khan.shortDescription: Jikan Genghis Khan, caliph na biyar na Daular Mongol kuma mai kafa daular Yuan a kasar Sin.
kublai-khan.quote: Na ci duniya a kan doki, amma ba zan iya yin mulkinta da doki ba.
